name: Senator Rick Scott (R-FL)
subject: We’re counting on it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
**[I’m Senator Rick Scott from Florida](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=0f61627b9f5543579ffb6e16ed7c6d99&_e=m8Mykulb9oyFPXe2Zf5A6RBuVj3kbolZTaABxOwTRgUawmbbibMYisKPxLDr8MHfrky61GVMo3qVL5EJffE-WjUhNlmC8RHStR3EVBKeTaCjrIg1gvg3JTte65Ugjkczjh5RxFI4thEDygEX7Oy8Pj-6zHNqGijA8dUMp_wLhNudBkzwHfAiuyRsxw6XPsdfvFJZQ3pTzXN64vnVS0r9s3M18TJMsbgWtA68ZAL3EQJ5Vms-O-g8M5sxK6DWFItVbpxzdXUcQoEa6lPzGf9JSkQuZY-8U0nVyPt3XtSPLmECKxKnvuyCifJKrVPhgeDO62HnogUuq2atsqsWaj3iLYalDs-QL7TmlKxRom4YmSI%3D)** – and for the next year and a half, I will be gearing up my re-election campaign to keep Florida RED.

I have 3 goals: **Win my campaign to keep Florida RED, help take back the Senate majority from the far-Left Democrats, and return some sanity to our country.**

I’m writing to you today to let you know about how invested and optimistic I am in seeing conservatives retake the Senate majority next year, and it starts with my race in Florida.

**My team is working night and day to build the support we need to win in Florida so that we can go on offense in other states to defeat the Democrat Senate Majority by next November.**

That’s why before March 31st, my team and I have set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to pledge their support to our efforts; taking back the Senate will be an “all hands on deck” effort and I'm counting on YOU.
---
| | [**HELP FLIP THE SENATE & ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=0f61627b9f5543579ffb6e16ed7c6d99&_e=m8Mykulb9oyFPXe2Zf5A6RBuVj3kbolZTaABxOwTRgUawmbbibMYisKPxLDr8MHfrky61GVMo3qVL5EJffE-WjUhNlmC8RHStR3EVBKeTaCjrIg1gvg3JTte65Ugjkczjh5RxFI4thEDygEX7Oy8Pj-6zHNqGijA8dUMp_wLhNudBkzwHfAiuyRsxw6XPsdfvFJZQ3pTzXN64vnVS0r9s06ee6bxMd_S5RvcG1qMOA91EEziBq8CFxABwqxZr3AsBKI4T259ROAdXfQHt8fdemL3_YccqtyisvFbc3Qt0hA6hZ27Yt7IP4cCCO3g1RJUwAt407_f0xTotfYJcX7RKLxvCblXLpkXBV5nKdRfoEc%3D)
---
| | It’s going to be a monumental task – Democrats are going to fight like never before to hold onto their SLIGHT Senate majority; _**Democrats are going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to paint Republicans in the worst possible light**._ Democrats will lie about Republicans’ records of accomplishment, and they will smear us every chance they get.

Think about what is at stake IF Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year:
1. Democrats will kill the filibuster if they don’t do it sooner,
2. They’ll spend trillions on pet projects that we will never be able to pay off,
3. And they will keep our borders open!

**Victory is within grasp – but we will come up short if we don’t have the support of every conservative from across the country.**

I’m passionate about our shared conservative beliefs and [**I’m asking you to add your name to our petition today pledging your support to our cause**.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=0f61627b9f5543579ffb6e16ed7c6d99&_e=m8Mykulb9oyFPXe2Zf5A6RBuVj3kbolZTaABxOwTRgUawmbbibMYisKPxLDr8MHfrky61GVMo3qVL5EJffE-WjUhNlmC8RHStR3EVBKeTaCjrIg1gvg3JTte65Ugjkczjh5RxFI4thEDygEX7Oy8Pj-6zHNqGijA8dUMp_wLhNudBkzwHfAiuyRsxw6XPsdfvFJZQ3pTzXN64vnVS0r9s_U8s2PwQfy48haFvnzQ4qQ5S6ZfUTe-X9r9ON52zjhPmHfX8cxQhAGfx7AQc9zvapvCIfttVKc6VCtpUBoABc2MEKJ4-B8NP5A6xVsn1AKyLJB0bTP-2os6auL49lk9ywmid6mfDR-jl82lSbKCF5U%3D)

Republican Leaders in Washington are counting on you. Florida is counting on you. The future of our nation is at stake.
---
[**HELP FLIP THE SENATE & ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=0f61627b9f5543579ffb6e16ed7c6d99&_e=m8Mykulb9oyFPXe2Zf5A6RBuVj3kbolZTaABxOwTRgUawmbbibMYisKPxLDr8MHfrky61GVMo3qVL5EJffE-WjUhNlmC8RHStR3EVBKeTaCjrIg1gvg3JTte65Ugjkczjh5RxFI4thEDygEX7Oy8Pj-6zHNqGijA8dUMp_wLhNudBkzwHfAiuyRsxw6XPsdfvFJZQ3pTzXN64vnVS0r9s9JJwyAzHrSYSy7OiLUavCLrpoDkCd2fTyHhtfkF8EV7v5dnzOF-zdXCZwJONwy1ovc5TAhcR3FGuIN0B655zbweFcnyNdPbslWPJKMFlubk4mbehTMo7XwWT7qmVDSPC6HAoApd0lFhTIJFFLsrxno%3D)
---
Let’s get this done,
Senator Rick Scott (R-FL)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: I’m Standing With Rural Oregonians
body:
I have exciting news for you... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/97c781e15e06/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8120479?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=54404015ed&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter, I have some exciting news to share with you!

_**My resolution to ease regulatory burden on rural Oregonians has passed the House with bipartisan support. **_

This joint resolution will halt the Environmental Protection Agency's (EPA) proposed Waters of the United States (WOTUS) rule, which would have imposed sudden, costly, and overbearing regulations on our farmers and ranchers in Oregon.

As you know, Oregon farmers and ranchers do not need bureaucrats in D.C. telling them how to operate. They need a consistent regulatory environment so they can plan and make decisions from season to season.

_That's why I'm proud to have co-sponsored this resolution and helped lead the charge to protect the interests of our rural communities._

This WOTUS rule would make water management in Oregon more difficult and further jeopardize our family farms and ranches, which are already over-regulated. It creates confusion and gives far-away Washington bureaucrats the authority to regulate state waters. That's why it's important to halt the EPA's proposed WOTUS rule and protect the livelihoods of our rural Oregonians.

The resolution of disapproval, if enacted, would terminate the administration's WOTUS rulemaking through the Congressional Review Act (CRA). This act can be used by Congress to overturn certain final agency actions. _**Now that it has passed the House, it's time for the Senate to act and pass the identical version that has already been introduced with the support of all 49 Republican senators.**_

As we move forward, I'm committed to fighting for our rural communities and ensuring they have the resources they need to succeed. But I can't do it alone. That's why I'm asking for your support. [_**Will you join me in this fight by making a donation to my campaign today?**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=41836a339f&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a2b285ba94&e=c87c5d8d97 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Together, we can protect the interests of rural Oregonians and ensure they have a voice in Washington.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely, [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=bada23adcf&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=61e0693729&e=c87c5d8d97)

| Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American.
---

* [Low Taxes, Balanced Budgets](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=6968e81149&e=c87c5d8d97)
* [Keeping our Communities Safe](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=8f16f7d27f&e=c87c5d8d97)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: What if you knew…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
$3 today could help Lucas Kunce defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
#
Hey Peter, I have a question for you.
**If you knew chipping in $3 right now could help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2024... would you do it?**
What if you knew that donating $3 today meant we’d have one more vote in the Senate to end the filibuster, protect abortion access + voting rights, and finally make real investments into the American people?
Or what if I told you GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are already targeting Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran on a mission to replace Josh Hawley, with attacks — and that your $3 donation would help him stand up and fight back when it matters most?
Lucas is building this movement without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so early investments (of even just $3) are the best way we can prepare our campaign for the fight ahead.
Tens of thousands of grassroots supporters have already done their part — and now we need your help today.
**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you add your very first donation of $3 (or more) to our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29824?refcode=em20230324-2876&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2876%2E614464%2EYCs_H0)**

name: Ryan Frankenberry
subject: PEIA PUBLIC HEARINGS NEXT WEEK
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
Hi Friend,
In light of recent benefit changes enacted by the Legislature, PEIA will be making changes to the Plan Year 2024 Financial Plan (effective July 1, 2023). Before adopting the revised 2024 Financial Plan, the PEIA Finance Board will hold a series of public hearings next week.
The meetings will be held in Charleston, Huntington, Morgantown and Martinsburg. We encourage you to take action and make your voices heard! See the graphic below for the dates and times.
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/WVDP%20PEIA%20Public%20Hearings%202023.png]
Please consider chipping in below to help us continue to keep you informed and hold the GOP accountable for targeting hardworking West Virginians.
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
$15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
If you cannot attend a hearing in person, please submit comments to the Finance Board in writing to 601 57th St., SE, Suite 2, Charleston, WV 25304-2345, or via e-mail to: PEIAComments@wv.gov .
The Finance Board will meet again March 30 at 1:00 p.m. to consider comments obtained in the public meetings and to adopt the Finance Plan for Plan Year 2024.
Hundreds of thousands of West Virginia families will be affected by these benefit changes.
Again, we need your help. Please chip in below to help us hold the GOP accountable.
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
$15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdems-contribute?refcode=publichearingpeia]
Onward,
Ryan Frankenberry
WVDP Executive Director

Anna Hudson is the steadfast Republican promoter that Honolulu County needs to grow the Hawaiʻi Republican Party on Oʻahu and put candidates in the best position for success. She has proven her commitment and leadership skills time and again at the state, county, and district level. She’s exactly who Conservatives need leading the charge in this role.

name: James Carville
subject: We can kiss our Senate majority goodbye
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42348?t=6&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND) Hey folks, — James Carville here. Jon Tester just launched his reelection campaign and I can already tell this race is going to be NUTS!!

We already know the Senate majority will come down to Montana – and if we don’t keep Jon Tester in the Senate, **Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye!**

I have a reputation for calling it like it is. In my expert opinion, _this is the most important election in the country._ We don’t yet know who Jon’s Republican opponent will be, but we have a few clues, and none of the options look good.

That’s why we need to do EVERYTHING we can to support Jon in this race right as this campaign is rolling!

When I called Jon to ask how I could help, he said they had a critical fundraising coming up in 7 days and he thought I might be able to convince you folks how important this is.

**So listen up, folks: This election is going to be close. Right now, Jon’s team is $210,876 short of their goal! This early in the game, in a race as important as this one, this is not the time to be falling behind.**

[**With just hours left in this critical end-of-quarter deadline, I’m asking you to step up to the plate and chip in a split donation between Voter Protection Project and Jon’s campaign. Our Senate majority depends on your support:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42348?t=7&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42349?t=8&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42350?t=9&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42351?t=10&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42352?t=11&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42353?t=12&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND)
Thanks, y’all. Let’s do this thing!

— James Carville
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6769%2E878179%2EezMGND)

subject: “He tried it and it WORKED!”
body:

| **“He tried it and
it WORKED!”****NASHVILLE, TN –** Timothy C. was on the police force for decades, and was having pain and inflammation all over his body, at times barely able to walk...But then he discovered Patriot Power GreensTM, and now he's down 35 lbs, walking normally and doctors can't believe his progress.Here's Timothy in his own words:[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._vC6__XsWhsx4BLm4BPwXw)_"I have fought joint inflammation for years. Knees were giving me grief, and I would have days where I could barely walk.__After about 3 days, my knees cleared up nicely. I was walking normally. My right knee has not hurt even once since then.__I have startled the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical problems, perfect lab results and no medications!"_**Thousands have
already experienced the
life-changing benefits of
this doctor-formulated
super-drink.**As you can see from all these amazing stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.**Tony W. writes...**
"Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."**Mike B. writes...**
"Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."**Michael W. writes...**
"I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I'm an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."**Finally! A drink designed to restore youthful energy and pain-FREE movement:**
* 40+ Fruits and Vegetables
* Critical Probiotics & Enzymes
* Superfoods from Around the World
* Delicious Organic Favorites
* Critical Vitamin & Mineral Blends
* Long-lasting Energy
* Inflammation Support for Aches and Pains
* Cardiovascular and Circulation Support
* Worry-Free Digestion
* 72 Carefully Selected Ingredients in Every Scoop!

**What's the secret behind this miracle drink?** It's a **Doctor-formulated** super-drink that was originally created to give a huge physical and mental boost to our fighting men and women in the military.And it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day. And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.And now, it's available for you to try![**Get your Patriot Power Greens today and save $257 PLUS get 3 canisters FREE! (while supplies last)**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._ILNEKwceMO8M4iw)**Please act fast –** because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health AllianceP.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past._**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-6MaMamOwvGq3gFQ).**More Raving Reviews From Customers**| | **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20 lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---

name: American Defense News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb6rdpn0dg1msr77tq20nlo2ap82741dbtrujnfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt09sls9bm55ij21mmgcv6gfbbq07am37h0arag0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5dff59lgc878qp6svqoo64mhogjbqm0nldddsqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziqudadsid1g7spviofh1421red0tdhl4jrk588g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7qu0cvt1f5ci6nuuvk4nakn1vqs4pamlrmcaufg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1chh2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2a9pasp3v99pcdo8oa53oe05hmoe07k43ms8ghg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1chh2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmi7ttpc0bqnt1d2944hsa0gtjbhnjdueq7pkk9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stj61ob1chh2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from ICYMI is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf0183rlqma3bgcfqtnmovslgdtglp44nj3huge0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm0oj2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcji86qjutv36mpf5pmu5vcib374feq96f4toa1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm0oj2cjh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfe1f39lb0369l4j4hd85j98geggfmv0u73e6isg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm0oj2cjh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from ICYMI is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653101%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fi3xIJ39i0ayphANKZoGsA&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653102%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1CI7CdJ1o9MUJ%2fIgXJFiVg&sysid=1)

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _“insurrectionists,”_ then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ev7k1ldffqbrit941ce74v7c58qv4e5vrgvf20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg1c6m7mq9uuqmbanje6tthhorjiqp3tkc8ai33g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c9h2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlfjd8d0i8j83ptpq74c5m1vstmck4m30aip5amo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c9h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh5fkdo1q00ek7e4t6sskg9ejpmne3hbuqq78tho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1jm4ob4s5h238h1e8he4933ctieeob2c1h64oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zli4pmeklpbe2t12mo1jcb7grug6smmh0sh5hijg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za7qi060up1ogadqti1g4om6d0dhivovvetqlico_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: House Freedom Caucus Chair Scott Perry
subject: Flesh-eating Fentanyl crossing the border….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Patriots for Perry
body:
It's just another day, however, on Joe Biden's illegal open border.

| | |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb9ta1gh2do3rhpd3evit7ld72mq7dcmt7olspp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c3h2bs)
---
| | Friend,

Did you see this?

[****](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z04lna74tkk1ulf3465vlba2ti0o1chf8t09dk4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c3h2bs)

That's a breathtaking headline.

It's just another day, however, on Joe Biden's illegal open border.

The American People have suffered long enough. The #1 cause of youth death in America is drug overdoses linked to - you guessed it - the poison flowing daily across our border.

Cartels terrorize our communities and murder American Citizens - to include our Border Agents - with impunity. This is nothing short of an act of war on America waged by the thugs of the cartels committed to profiting off the deaths of our Citizens.

This is a national security threat, plain and simple. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas' refusal to treat it that way is a dereliction of duty.

He _**must**_ be impeached.

Please sign this petition to convince my fellow colleagues that the American People are FED UP with this lawlessness.
---
| [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zonbqqu1pnh8umu4n5shq94pdleq0jj897ssm440_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c3h2bs "IMPEACH MAYORKAS")
---
|
One of the first acts of this Republican Congress was to rein in the border. I proudly signed on as an original cosponsor for Articles of Impeachment to remove Secretary Mayorkas. I will not relinquish this fight, and I need your help.

[****](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zabmr393a371c04kasfqvr7i4srvn3t0ghqd4a8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c3h2bs)

Let 's be clear here, Friend. Mayorkas has been a **Joe Biden / George Soros lackey** for too long, targeting our Border Patrol Agents and encouraging waves of illegal migrants to surge the border.

He's insulted our men and women at the front lines of the border crisis, facilitated the largest drop in border agent recruitment, and has allowed "catch and release" to unleash cartel agents into our communities _without recourse._

Please stand with me to impeach Secretary Mayorkas. Help convince my colleagues in the House that the American People want our Country back, and that they want border security despite what the liberal media is selling.
---
| [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlgpg09ms7tlnpblu6g8t5d50g5um2r5vb01t350_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o32c3h2bs "IMPEACH MAYORKAS")
---
|
Thanks,
Scott Perry

name: Allen West
subject: Shall NOT be infringed
body:
The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ...

| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb6od7cnavhuais1m2tgcraqd0fed8mqa50i1vjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o36c9h2bs)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide.Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ...The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it.[**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8ge9ftcesguqgqgdbm1jic6hpbvr9034503uuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o36c9h2bs) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ...It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge.I know it... You know it ...**That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS!There are a lot of groups out there “pledging” to protect your Second Amendment Rights.You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been?But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute.The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ...[**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation of $35 today?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8kti5qgjn3pm6uqg8u8nhudeg4el7vr23vas4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o36c9h2bs) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ...* Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses* Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!!But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare $35 to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4k460c33bi8v3oc62davmovnnvk6t55f9aae9og_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o36c9h2bs) If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more.If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different!But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms.Now let's get to work together.God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret)Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost.That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift of $35, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfokat6eqmqdf7715aego0qu712kga82daec5jd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o36c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdbg04kkqse82vrk8uvabpbqij52i3i7c1htbs2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm4o36c9h2bs)
---
| |

---
|
---

body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpfn6ap0cg39brnfngaifggj9mqrgt5758830o70_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt4bk4td93o7ll2gpjp2l3cpnihsrjg922cklps8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ffiqdbkuhfui8jqbv2g63aidjbaaa9he5vaca8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8bneo1hkeg6r5plj0toe0pv4hi83volv5f4jho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbp2hkmkbhg40a43hc5b7mimofjvo39f1gr00fhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z40kpo0iu1i5ne1s6l9ta6ge1s2248mvp83ioeno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0jgdb72l2t4v9bo2eq8ckom3c36bb49la2sr5tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj9erns2oscu7m8i39eruga0a0mok2sal2e1l8d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgmco72c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Here’s who I’m supporting right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
Here's how you can help!

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Many people have asked me how I choose who I'm supporting, and I want to be clear...

I will only support Republican fighters who understand the Left is actively working to take away our freedoms and usurp more power for the Federal bureacracy.

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: I have breaking news to share with you…
body:
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478932:JQzaMZGfN:m:1:3365131770:BB74DEB008611ACA257B346825C84DB5:r)
---
Fellow Patriot, I have breaking news to share with you... My team at America First Legal just released our second batch of **Biden Documents** that the federal government attempted to keep hidden until we forced their release with our aggressive litigation and investigatory tactics. [**_Support us now to help expose Biden corruption_ >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478932:JQzaMZGfN:m:1:3365131770:BB74DEB008611ACA257B346825C84DB5:r) This **second trove of shocking documents** confirms there was effectively no daylight between Joe Biden and Hunter Biden regarding the Biden family's business dealings in Ukraine. But there is more. **These never-before-seen records and emails contain more explosive revelations** , _including:_ **#1 -** Then Vice President Biden personally signed off on the statement given in response to reporters about whether Hunter's appointment to **Burisma** undermines the Vice President's credibility in pushing anti-corruption measures in the Ukraine; **#2 -** The Office of the Vice President connected reporters writing about Hunter's appointment to**Burisma** to Amos Hochstein, a trusted Biden advisor who was then the "point person" for International Energy Affairs at the U.S. Department of State, to provide a "unique and valuable perspective" on the relationships in Ukraine; **#3 -** The Office of the Vice President coordinated closely with Hunter Biden's notorious firm **Rosemont Seneca Advisors** (the firm has been prominently involved in Hunter Biden's various international business dealings, which Joe Biden has claimed to know nothing about) in response to press inquiries; **#4 -** U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Marie L. Yovanovitch, reported _- to the Department of State's Victoria Nuland, Anna Makanju in Vice President Biden's Office, and the National Security Counsel's Eric Ciaramella-_**that "this time there are accusations that Burisma allegedly had a subsidiary dump natural gas as a way to pay bribes" and "mentions that Hunter Biden and former Polish President Kwasniewski are on the Burisma board."** Taken together with the Oversight Committee's revelations about the Biden Family finances, **it is now _indisputable_ that there is a need for a full criminal investigation** into the Bidens' foreign influence peddling and exotic foreign financial payoffs. We now have the evidence in plain sight. _This can be ignored no longer!_
| [**HELP EXPOSE BIDEN >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478932:JQzaMZGfN:m:1:3365131770:BB74DEB008611ACA257B346825C84DB5:r)
---
This is yet another example of how our hard work at America First Legal is paying off and getting results for _YOU_ , the American People. [**Please make a generous and urgently needed donation now to help my team continue the fight and expose Biden 's corruption in a court of law. ****_Please help us continue the investigation right now >> _****_ _**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478932:JQzaMZGfN:m:1:3365131770:BB74DEB008611ACA257B346825C84DB5:r) _With deep gratitude for your continuously brave support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|
---
Note: This hard evidence which shows the intertwinement of Hunter Biden's foreign dealings with then Vice President Joe Biden, _including proof that people inside Biden's Vice Presidential Office knew about and were worried about Biden's Burisma_ _dealings_ would not have been discovered without our lawsuits.**
| [**DONATE HERE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478932:JQzaMZGfN:m:1:3365131770:BB74DEB008611ACA257B346825C84DB5:r)
---

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Send a message to President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478942:6kjQzZGNc:m:1:3331421248:4FF94061D1687B353E676F1E08C011AA:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478942:6kjQzZGNc:m:1:3331421248:4FF94061D1687B353E676F1E08C011AA:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478942:6kjQzZGNc:m:1:3331421248:4FF94061D1687B353E676F1E08C011AA:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478942:6kjQzZGNc:m:1:3331421248:4FF94061D1687B353E676F1E08C011AA:r)

body:

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7119eo3dhcv9u3ijar31ii87t6kv9akv4umuoeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)

| | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl6uingq7ap7gsdmadirs4pt2hjt7bmjq03oa3c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2n59uha24um9srb2v2phdngk84u6r62gnm4uh4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to **[sign up today for FREE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidlmuhae396pn0eja2hpgc0kr8dvnblb8k64sd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)**. In today’s world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. Get _[The Flyover](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo35qlfqmrrea2tl8q8l8ntrf5bp08tm6uq6ugdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)_ delivered to your inbox every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday so you do not miss out on anything. Our team summarizes every story in a couple sentences or less and offers you a link to the full story so you can read deeper on what matters to you. _[The Flyover](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zct7v905fq3pna7ka7d0uedcjkheel9ed7j30ib0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)_ covers a wide array of topics, so you stay informed on what is important. Politics, sports, market watch, scientific advancements, etc. we cover it all, so you stay informed. Join The Flyover today to cruise the news and just land the facts. **_[Don’t miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z39lmpi21dp3km7qhnbgf65dha46ornv5msrvqtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4stgm9oj6cth2bs)_**

name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02139%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tsz9lFjvhnLw1l7qO3CC7A&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02130%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hCbV27nGEfYYqvWIGPNIeA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02131%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WS6jtTwZWz6lfkT3CCiB2g&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02132%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2fPEs1qeLRyD%2b%2bhNSAncrQ&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News _625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7353%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Jwaet46mBK8usEjUdXSpIQ&sysid=1)_

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Your America News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fPdB5Ei5tqgdNzKjm9ngtg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tGsEmA23bVUhqQqGKgma9g&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tGsEmA23bVUhqQqGKgma9g&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| American Update
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: These 6 things must be done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaRxc6DwFWp42nLmH-DKQq586V7dKO_fvHn9bh9ikJrGdIyhsZzWeJCnSY7cJTYDJ7jDi_RqbEI6G8tpbn6YTTnMwKH9xNkzueZIfuo6c74EvR5FFHi7gz_eISt0zjcOAXgqkZfAjrn657lbBLBCrCfUtkXHxgsU8bLi4sSgR4pPjQ4Z-MRdwr-zsOR-4YUTC1qb4M9XhHGk_qyB0nMHCJqVScjE3DfL-_Of419fdXXFmZ2xYpXt9vVYMJkmepfSt-68Z2mj5YejoJFAWvCS1Wfceho-v1ssdFZQZxfiq1HAEsV2EOh7_K0L4OfJEViKpCeMJn30bRfEVBws6HNiDVRKmprqBHBFCcHH-3hEtP83vx)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaRxc6DwFWp42nLmH-DKQq586V7dKO_fvHn9bh9ikJrGdIyhsZzWeJCnSY7cJTYDJ7jDi_RqbEI6G8tpbn6YTTnMwKH9xNkzueZIfuo6c74EvR5FFHi7gz_eISt0zjcOAXgqkZfAjrn657lbBLBCrCfUtkXHxgsU8bLi4sSgR4pPjQ4Z-MRdwr-zsOR-4YUTC1qb4M9XhHGk_qyB0nMHCJqVTkn-T6xC4ycvIS4sMRv6JuKk-ml3EqSBx6z6eeSkpC5EM8l9k1lZcXZttsBP322BNnV3pCpH7OaEv7sgeKEde1EYNx1HIQ7YEBinxro9BZ8txS85iP9UHdBkOy1DXwwJ44u_WMWIlSj18b6Ad0tj2c)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaRxc6DwFWp42nLmH-DKQq586V7dKO_fvHn9bh9ikJrGdIyhsZzWeJCnSY7cJTYDJ7jDi_RqbEI6G8tpbn6YTTnMwKH9xNkzueZIfuo6c74EvR5FFHi7gz_eISt0zjcOAXgqkZfAjrn657lbBLBCrCfUtkXHxgsU8bLi4sSgR4pPjQ4Z-MRdwr-zsOR-4YUTC1qb4M9XhHGk_qyB0nMHCJqVS-jgQBnG3NeB657gBi67w5Hdsn6sD2q4vpGyMPOd4L7thyrc6OMsTOGdbSu3Gmz_Yxi3AYj83ewH03D3GcLtpXkBOOBQmX3UEtG-YancbHc7I2jtd2-q12fWtYmdDpmWNKqtY7-Sm7l1B1h8_PTVVG)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaRxc6DwFWp42nLmH-DKQq586V7dKO_fvHn9bh9ikJrGdIyhsZzWeJCnSY7cJTYDJ7jDi_RqbEI6G8tpbn6YTTnMwKH9xNkzueZIfuo6c74EvR5FFHi7gz_eISt0zjcOAXgqkZfAjrn657lbBLBCrCfUtkXHxgsU8bLi4sSgR4pPjQ4Z-MRdwr-zsOR-4YUTC1qb4M9XhHGk_qyB0nMHCJqVQpkFGRpnS9mqF-uYOEKR6guY-Udqmlvpf0gVQxlmv_pQEOqFsObtIpsVonERYtL4eSXhXvcO4tRHpv7Uh9MgOiKgXCwZvExD-tJkYjz5WXsZk3JvX1mMDWd25yDv2lW9TwBQQ5G3-4KYpk46qzmCqP)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaRxc6DwFWp42nLmH-DKQq586V7dKO_fvHn9bh9ikJrGdIyhsZzWeJCnSY7cJTYDJ7jDi_RqbEI6G8tpbn6YTTnMwKH9xNkzueZIfuo6c74EvR5FFHi7gz_eISt0zjcOAXgqkZfAjrn657lbBLBCrCfUtkXHxgsU8bLi4sSgR4pPjQ4Z-MRdwr-zsOR-4YUTC1qb4M9XhHGk_qyB0nMHCJqVQIv5rKjw2vyK-uZ0pYCuYZbOPpaZer4fP7THxby2k4o45W0G5BFzDE9Y7hhQYLZEPNslUeiHaPrTonZMlInqWrrf6c7EYbgyigpFhyLdxpUFTtxzlrqpHPSG06wl5nOTCWTScuw2kWQgi1DBC1PsRe)

---

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaR0L_Cyo_ak_ZHZAIf9i-cQPnEWQvOyi4gQOGOsrqubRqdxQNGOK4duqkMHmJywABjg1qw52eBUh929HHVC20gmfRueiSzccr5i0DiGH7-oca2eHp4bzQ_sD3VxSTwanC6KXHQJOczxjzd_A1k-zNytm4iTvUUvUrDAeRB_5wnZFE_eOI8QaQJEH1tgBVODOi1cQqUcN8fBiQgI2XroZfDOM%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaR95ZZEZBY3JttqPVoUJOZB_1ytBhPSyzCQgss1PUEjowDEnHXHK-uXpJaT_hmj0tuPrBj6UfUG5zCtKpI5q_wDGgvXJVDaTMexkuosoRP_fiL5YS7vxBl4jIq-duMUabSv-skYLu3fui-DL6KtrpnPhb6ygRKHAmaEB1fmVine7HS8Ncda8COMQIrie2u7BESg%3D%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a61f31e03586459880bc2f3aae2f07e1&_e=Hwbm9RjfSSHPWqIrmhMaR65xqSa0ArJKCV_nsE6Erj6y73cX210iHq_J284PJlONBVSTaYk2ELogyDQcKcS5t34z9DRnfbLyv60qrW9KsnwQvwQvPrUAUCEYK974Kq2Cyt9Q_NCOA5S-ttDCJorGwb10cWBuRcdJTnm0jomU-AHQeeTW4BIKGKGxfztaulyZ7fV7PHDQj1Z9w214HjMYkx9PXorC0fkp_hriMkrlTQw%3D)

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d57cbd4a55da406ca9317a5a2c3712db&_e=P1P8bU_kXfFAnzdWAkK31iOlkRzYt0rtXVLlY1Bc3Jix-xYCNqfCjoKIMkRnKD7ow0VC7xOF1GTKv8oDDJqaPf7bTeryqSK_Ilo7a1HUo7QrjhDQa6KZ9xunHQjax3Hef4r1znhoI0fNlPVYE1TTJIsvnxdpr91YPpnsba0ab9GxeizChtZACECZdW0LThJCGiUovLjjIWddLtlc42I-abj0_a-41nuJ59F9ytptWkmdPKk8UUGNPFnJOXi-9ENAVCJ9MbtvZ-btodmJZb9BJ93wCL-8TJwbTsSn6lYb25k%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d57cbd4a55da406ca9317a5a2c3712db&_e=P1P8bU_kXfFAnzdWAkK31iOlkRzYt0rtXVLlY1Bc3Jix-xYCNqfCjoKIMkRnKD7ow0VC7xOF1GTKv8oDDJqaPf7bTeryqSK_Ilo7a1HUo7QrjhDQa6KZ9xunHQjax3Hef4r1znhoI0fNlPVYE1TTJEnFAq9fL3Ue4HBxmdoeU9_EX0KmAhLu2W7uT4BdE-fbG9anitzI1GHptA8apva5hdwSvwmIHTRp-kUxaPVeIh2sBdrFGnuEfIObwP_ryg5uIKFo7ILOnOR0E3GZzzyw29CXjK1XVlPOQd7B1rgpq7k%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d57cbd4a55da406ca9317a5a2c3712db&_e=P1P8bU_kXfFAnzdWAkK31iOlkRzYt0rtXVLlY1Bc3Jix-xYCNqfCjoKIMkRnKD7ow0VC7xOF1GTKv8oDDJqaPf7bTeryqSK_Ilo7a1HUo7QrjhDQa6KZ9xunHQjax3Hef4r1znhoI0fNlPVYE1TTJAnnJD8eiRDFiZw4R5HTrTFRIjBLF7MrpHszMgn9-wvICJIZvI2_f_MMnvbWE0gAfoRh0x5qO3EK_at05BzDt2_fmXUOR-O0qYqVhIuMOIGS-dMCWNwo1oseqGQeEqFD1F3t9gOKW8JO70gvTxBJhn0%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. As you know, I am not able to raise money while I'm in session. As the incumbent Virginia Senator in my district, I was the only one in session.
That put me a bit behind the 8-ball for my campaign. And I'm a little bit short of where I need to be!
My name is Amanda Chase, and I am the incumbent State Senator for Virginia's 12th district. I have an essential primary coming up in June. The RINOs are trying to take me out, and it's go time.
[I'll cut right to the point: I'm about $12,990 short of my March goal. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vd8STviZLmGsOJ0m1nSGB_8rGszirSaZQfBjR2vyYsE1ZH6mIwD7Pk1wDTUCfLVXl-fO7w9M_8S85TrU27LB9b-L01Z0da8bbsvDJUnYei8-whsOUQXdOGOLuD1ToyP-v8muxxobksxoXlBV1d9Ok2neTwv1D_nuVTSkJ0I6o7o=&c=E9Y8tYkDPrtBlm0ZO_cLALdfTeqKkO_ctu9hHv4lOWUU_SO1YNGENg==&ch=VMCCw4H9lx0627C9BAE1of3ab9rSXcEMTTIRAgMqzwbK1U9P5w2Zsg==)
I had two months of no fundraising, so I MUST make this count. Will you be there for me this one more time?
I NEED to make my goal, or we may be swamped with lobbyist cash. YOU can really make the difference here!
