name: Don Huffines
subject: Huffines Liberty Roundup
body:
The Huffines Liberty Foundation has been off to a tremendous start this legislative session.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-z/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **HLF Roundup**
Hello Patriots,The Huffines Liberty Foundation has been off to a tremendous start this legislative session.My personal work and the work of the Foundation are devoted to offering a critique of what's wrong--and more importantly, offering solutions to increase economic liberty and prosperity in Texas.**On that note, here are a few things all liberty-lovers will enjoy:** 1\. First things first, I published an op-ed in Real Clear Policy on securing the Texas Border, which you should find interesting. I firmly believe that economic pressure on Mexico is the only way to stop the invasion.** Read my op-ed [HERE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-y/).**2\. On the tax front, the _Dallas Express_ published an exclusive on research we broke earlier this month, finding that property tax revenue rose 12% in 2022 despite "relief" from the Texas Legislature. Property taxes are a big issue in Texas, and legislators have gone about it all wrong. The good news is that fixing the issue is not rocket science. ** Read the exclusive [HERE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-j/).**** ****Read the research[HERE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-t/).**3\. Finally, we testified before the Texas Legislature's Ways and Means Committee on House Bill 2 and the Senate Finance Committee on Senate Bills 3, 4, and 5. We found that these bills only treat the symptoms of our broken property tax system while failing to address the underlying disease: incessant growth in local government and school district spending. This is the same failed song that Austin sings every two years. These bills will not permanently lower property taxes for any Texans. Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes.** Read our analysis on HB 2 [HERE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-h/).**** Read our analysis on SB 3, 4, and 5 [HERE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-k/).**** BONUS: [Expanding the Homestead Exemption Does Not Offer Meaningful Property Tax Relief](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-u/)**As always, remember, _if we lose Texas, we lose the free world_.Blessings in Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always,Don Huffines
President [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-n/) [Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-p/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-e/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fkjtddy-l-s)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-f/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-fkjtddy-17329976-yuddtktydi-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-fkjtddy-yuddtktydi-w/)

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ff32570-3de8-4310-8210-b83526ea325a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **__UPDATE: _We've already written to you about the most important race this year--which may determine whether we remain a democracy. But a NEW EXPOSE on right wing nut, Dan Kelly, makes the danger all too clear._** **_If you’ve already had a chance to help, thank you! Could you consider chipping in $5 extra today to shift the odds further in our favor?_** **_If you were waiting to help, your contribution could still be a vital part of pushing back against right-wing attack ads that are flooding the state, and reminding voters about this important, off-season election._** _As a reminder, Wisconsin has an election on April 4th, for Supreme Court,_ and this one race will determine if there's a progressive Democratic majority or insane MAGA Republican majority on The Court.__ _Progressive Janet Protasiewicz would join 3 liberal colleagues for a 4-3 Democratic majority. They'll overturn the cruel abortion ban that made millions of women state property and block Trump or DeSantis henchmen from stealing Wisconsin's electoral votes in 2024, as Trump attempted to do in 2020._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never find out how dangerous Dan Kelly could be, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c4dd8b3-90fe-4f13-a88e-db5160638a43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **_It's hard to put into words the menace posed by abortion-hating, Trump-endorsed lunatic, Dan Kelly, if he wins. Yet, we don't have to, as it's made crystal clear in this explosive expose (see image below) by the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel on Kelly's moral sickness:_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69f73753-bafb-45d4-82f1-b399bcb391c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This degenerate, Kelly, is unfit to be local dog catcher, much less a man who decides whether Donald or DeSantis can steal an election. ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never find out how bad he could be, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4063b39-2ced-4adc-b38d-2938368102f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for stopping this evil in its tracks and saving our democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11898919-d893-41fb-94e6-903528b3287d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mark
subject: My father was an alcoholic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
| |
---
| | | My friend,

My father was an abusive alcoholic. I grew up in extreme poverty with no shower, no heat, no AC - nothing.

My name is Mark Robinson. I'm a conservative Republican and in 2020 I was elected as the first black Lt. Gov. of North Carolina.
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479032:JcWKnZGNc:m:1:3391001263:ABAA8B955E8F5B2547725842BC973DB7:r)
---

Woke Democrats and the liberal media will tell you that I should be a Democrat by default.

But it is my faith in God, and my love of freedom that makes me who I am.

And it is because of this, the Democrats have made me public enemy number one.

Who I am & what I believe in threatens the woke left & their divisive narrative that race, gender, and economic status determine who we are as Americans.

They have millions in place to destroy me for not falling in line & they'll stop at nothing to shut me up.

But God gives his toughest battles to his strongest soldiers & with your support today, I am confident He will see us through to victory.

---
| | | | | [Chip in $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479032:JcWKnZGNc:m:1:3391001263:ABAA8B955E8F5B2547725842BC973DB7:r)

---

We have defeated the Democrats once already, and with your help today we can & we WILL do so again.

Thank you & God Bless,

Mark Robinson
Lt. Governor of North Carolina

name: Alek Skarlatos, Freedom Foundation
subject: Tell Congress to STOP unions
body:
| | | [](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/kFDW8giWgZIVyGkjk5zU3A)
---
Peter, Did you know **the top 20 Public-Sector Unions in America spent nearly $80 MILLION on political activity** and gifts in 2022? And that wasn’t even a Presidential Election year! Public-sector unions are **some of the largest lobbies** in America, and they’re entirely funded by **your taxpayer-dollars!** It’s no surprise those same government unions have a reputation for heavily supporting far-left political candidates and issues that expand government control and therefore the money public sector unions can take from their members... regardless of their members’ beliefs! It’s high time Congress do something about this! [**Freedom Foundation is taking a stand and urging Congress to STOP Public Sector Unions from funding far-left candidates and causes — with YOUR tax dollars — while giving their members no say. Will you help us by signing this open letter to Washington?**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/XzAVOcd5XnngXOipIqVotQ)
---
[Tell Congress to STOP labor unions](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/u3XCxcT2s5Ew__FIUiODTQ)
---
Government unions are a publicly funded lobby that consistently works against the interests of the taxpayers who are forced to bankroll them. While some states ban using union dues for Political Action Committee (PAC) contributions and require that any donations to political organizations be _voluntary_ ... most states do NOT have ANYTHING on the books to protect union workers from being taken advantage of by their far-left union-bosses. In many states, employees’ mandatory union dues are spent propping up candidates and political causes that go against their values. The only ones who win with the current rules in place are union bosses and the far-left politicians lining their campaign coffers with immoral stolen-adjacent money. [**We _must_ tell Congress to prevent Public Sector Unions from spending YOUR hard-earned tax dollars on radical political causes that neither you the taxpayer, nor the vast majority of union member's support. Please sign this open letter today and tell Congress, to “STOP the unions!”**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/Bi1oR12OOLxfi75dPQ0l7Q) Public sector unions are a multi-billion-dollar industry that almost exclusively supports one political party. Essentially, these taxpayer-funded unions serve as the funding arm of the radical left. The problem is amplified when the politicians these union bosses support can redefine certain movements as “non-political.” For example, in 2020 the “Defund the Police” movement was deemed “non-political” which meant unions were further enabled to steal their member’s money each paycheck to put toward one of the most radical agendas the country has ever seen. **Even though we all know they’re radically leftist causes!** We must act to put an end to this gross use of your taxpayer dollars. [**Please help us to urge Congress to STOP labor unions from using taxpayer money to fund radical leftist candidates and causes by signing this letter today.**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/fXTmj4ct860bdGMgSpMtZg)
---
[Tell Congress to STOP labor unions](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/VMmYbQy2y6Uqd8BP3h6tyQ)
---
In freedom, Alek Skarlatos Freedom Foundation
---
[**Support Freedom Foundation**](http://trk.skarlatosmail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U0tSMzY4OTEifQ/JCgqcopJhOlIwB-ijJGRCg)
---
PO Box 552
Olympia WA, 98507
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.skarlatosmail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NTk4ODc3NyIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDg0LTVhZjFiNWY3NWZhMjRlNGU4Njc2NWY5Y2E1OWFmODE3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/-WYHQBNrMs5uSVBlNSnKjw)

name: Mike Peppel
subject: When our government fails us, Americans have a history of helping each other
body:
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479666:J8lzBZGNm:m:1:3365131770:E3C448D30FC65581A0547E81F28CF1B0:r)
---
|
---
Peter, the news crews have left, and now it seems like the country has forgotten about the disaster my neighbors and I in Northeast Ohio lived through just over a month ago. Well, we're still living through it.
Just recently, a containment dam set up to mitigate the impact on the local water supply overflowed and once again spread toxic chemicals. We just can't catch a break.
| [ **SEND HELP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479666:J8lzBZGNm:m:1:3365131770:E3C448D30FC65581A0547E81F28CF1B0:r)
---
I'm Mike Peppel, a Columbiana County resident (right near East Palestine), who is taking action to help my friends and neighbors in need. I founded the Ohio Clean Water Project to provide direct aid to the impacted communities.
Right now I'm focused on providing as much clean drinking water as I can to families in need, which is why I'm emailing you today. If you can help out, please click the button below and send a case of water to a family in need.
| [ **SEND A CASE OF WATER** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479666:J8lzBZGNm:m:1:3365131770:E3C448D30FC65581A0547E81F28CF1B0:r)
---
President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about the people in rural Ohio, and that's why their response has been so lackluster.
That's why I'm asking for your help, because when our government fails us, Americans have a history of helping each other, and we are in need of your help.
[**If you're able, please send a donation and I'll do the rest in getting clean drinking water to the folks in East Palestine.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479666:J8lzBZGNm:m:1:3365131770:E3C448D30FC65581A0547E81F28CF1B0:r)
Thank you,
Mike Peppel Founder, Ohio Clean Water Fund

name: Allen West
subject: Subject or citizen?
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479371:JM7TZZGwN:m:1:3331421248:C3D0291EF81D99CD9519DCAF7DE0AA6E:r)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479371:JM7TZZGwN:m:1:3331421248:C3D0291EF81D99CD9519DCAF7DE0AA6E:r) Peter, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479371:JM7TZZGwN:m:1:3331421248:C3D0291EF81D99CD9519DCAF7DE0AA6E:r) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare a donation to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479371:JM7TZZGwN:m:1:3331421248:C3D0291EF81D99CD9519DCAF7DE0AA6E:r) If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done \-- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479371:JM7TZZGwN:m:1:3331421248:C3D0291EF81D99CD9519DCAF7DE0AA6E:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479371:JM7TZZGwN:m:1:3331421248:C3D0291EF81D99CD9519DCAF7DE0AA6E:r)
---
|
---
|
---

subject: Lack of Impulse Control, As Always

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljN0p0jivOiyLPVHKA03Kdq-eKM1H4tUS7vv1OzRYqDRjHLB1L_UygQEmCRTlrLOUpBubPQYzc8S6TmzgL7ipXv6I5sVQ-O75ApAuPOjc52BZB7xRnxvVBYMi_pakosOvn2Mo8bJFs9Rog4KnLIk9YEg%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljEdF-Uljsm4_ZTsh9RdmjInyoU-STQUPa09sMBIzwTcKOgIHtuhFSk8b2KptF4RGr4Ak5_fJOtisdIKi4XMu1SQ7PKKnO9iNJyFlVQ_U0q-XCRBfRAQ71BjUpXo1a5yZtkRVTaBh9SB_STpUPfviDJo%3D) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljHnbGX5u93RGhoqk5OhzH_tSr2Znd-FKj-F9ASWFYSuzcDn8d_gz010Zcjg3lAn3OZsl_QDbEcBN4oZxl02-par1p47D8O9YOl9XXXCpvvXT8LYH03KK_t8Vzliy8xQzkQn8Abz6IE2guYAtblvWKiQ%3D) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljLeicwdUS-beQ_V4Yn4xBgC8tgK6mfl3c3_bEXu5NhDusSC5IkdQgNm-Yu20L1dOFQnqWTRmKzX1U2zhN_pExRx8pxAFk6JpDiaLETorD1zx1kwK7Diy9vRRQpVvXajdq4F9cN7LPbxjrtAySTXAX5Y%3D) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljEdQzAMAiJmn2QX7vfZPyCPNGNfmyWFGPDpLfnuPVXiuW-x_ug6QYynHzj2fq0ZLJunTKzSPqawX7XjlUE3P_AN64JBqj0970Nym-CmRyJwq7b28Yq2mxCJjLKNrOrmXv93Z80CiPOVLdbTIIf0dZo0%3D) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljNvqPTFCNoRkIfe07QzVEdTWPDbH9mZNTVc-hSSXBNWEJUk5MTRd2POlv8AkQvaVn2zANQ7qNAGi9zdr5iRPFv92sjBMa8nkb1aDMKCtey0ekKSxsbioVjCKHFRKADEGe_ZwdXKlFSXeE-tBqTRStAg%3D). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03c2efa3f11a4c4c8b1a68e35893b60c&_e=Fouv-jnfyWnke1ngd6hvqkHSCbb9F9icHq-tm8iDPVHZKP1cDheSSnMA-JHgszh4VbVpZgY4RKQEgUyyL4EGkem9BJio9-zJqc8c0ApZcM3KteocBZxCS4JGFZOiWoNZGGfE01u2kWrVCdNQEEWljAwMbCdLPS87VcwnemMrghn3g5Tb98tpyEzt_1qYi_RdFyhwwwpB4A_D0EBcgeau37sLAvuGCYea1k0Bx1y2rUgwndeWO_ErYA4pVTEVxqYpoAjJOfqcOAV8dmkuUicOHtuD3dmYVdm3Z16AGVN15kI%3D) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

clean_body: We live in uncertain times. The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... body:
There's little time left to grab your ticket!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fk-DjFBOxVhmmztNCv8R8V0rlXLAVmPOefZj1C5QAwE=/QC0fVYadFm6zNHMjQbpz8ccwYFdYP0pCr_5zO61v72s=?refcode=EM_EV_230325PBR3_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrat,

We're emailing one last time to make sure you have the chance to grab your ticket for our Party Builder Awards, this Monday at the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council Hall!

**[If you already RSVP'd for the previous date, you're good to go. If not, RSVP ASAP to join Illinois Democrats from across the state at our most prestigious event of the year!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fk-DjFBOxVhmmztNCv8R8V0rlXLAVmPOefZj1C5QAwE=/qVmdpssQa17ypM_1QWvu-bblVJmPkbbsvp9VLE-6WUU=?refcode=EM_EV_230325PBR3_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1)** [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fk-DjFBOxVhmmztNCv8R8V0rlXLAVmPOefZj1C5QAwE=/qVmdpssQa17ypM_1QWvu-bblVJmPkbbsvp9VLE-6WUU=?refcode=EM_EV_230325PBR3_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_B1)
All proceeds go towards our crucial work building the Democratic Party's grassroots strength and electing Democrats across Illinois.

If you need more information about the event and where to get your ticket, check down below:

_**Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards Reception - THIS MONDAY**_

**WHEN:** Monday, March 27th from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm

**WHERE:** Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council Hall, 12 E Erie St, Chicago

**Honorary Event Co-Chairs: Tim Drea** , President of the Illinois AFL-CIO & **Bob Reiter** , President of the Chicago Federation of Labor

**Honorary Event Host Committee:** Hon. **JB Pritzker** , Hon. **Juliana Stratton** , Hon. **Kwame Raoul** , Hon. **Alexi Giannoulias** , Hon. **Susana Mendoza** , Hon. **Mike Frerichs** , Hon. **Don Harmon** , Hon. **Emanuel "Chris" Welch**, Hon. **Lisa Hernandez** , and Hon. **Toni Preckwinkle**

**RSVP HERE:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023partybuilderawards](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fk-DjFBOxVhmmztNCv8R8V0rlXLAVmPOefZj1C5QAwE=/qVmdpssQa17ypM_1QWvu-bblVJmPkbbsvp9VLE-6WUU=?refcode=EM_EV_230325PBR3_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L2)**

We hope to see you there,

Team IDCCA

State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500. A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board's official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL The Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association P.O. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=04cf0e0aa4b441b08c26f52c928eea43&_e=dXVNsOvvwFRVF-z7hd05wphZno3IqhPwAFbIWsOVPX6PtrU0utB6o2clzZZxw-UDE3-xmgn3FbJl9UT8Z88K3Vf5M-a6KvJgFVonDhdpt63FvA_ICHIbomcGPDm3ypuvBq29kOLlVpNQjsezphCbuz-3933Yfl-JW1f-ZfxPUMuhxlSjxhRciZx2IoFeWUzbT17xXH5KCU3FFI1OHKbwYtlxABh0OOZmoT-2C8MmwMoEZ0uWzm-O1PdohlUnYobVmwZDu1w5hXMGz-BiK6GeLR4zswC7Oev1EIk1mIovwMnN-slxGSvG4SGjH4X5Bm9SaMZOFjdALfv8AaGSrclfTdIrLJbj6THDhxZxui3wBzXmEMFXU44ozWfdtA-9t8n_DgCF-hBhGv18EnPgpOmJ7Ixmg-eozorPovZ-7ud3P82kkkp1xde6lCbtIWi2WOZM)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=04cf0e0aa4b441b08c26f52c928eea43&_e=dXVNsOvvwFRVF-z7hd05wphZno3IqhPwAFbIWsOVPX6PtrU0utB6o2clzZZxw-UDE3-xmgn3FbJl9UT8Z88K3Vf5M-a6KvJgFVonDhdpt63FvA_ICHIbomcGPDm3ypuvBq29kOLlVpNQjsezphCbuz-3933Yfl-JW1f-ZfxPUMuhxlSjxhRciZx2IoFeWUzbT17xXH5KCU3FFI1OHKbwYtlxABh0OOZmoT-2C8MmwMoEZ0uWzm-O1PdohlUnYobVmwZDu1w5hXMGz-BiK6GeLWrQQmdZSEu1LOWbh_y4Wo61h_b-iTpnHFwhqWfTzFVCbAJh81UUhJCvEnbG7j5sSZ2jzNW3kuRM81B8IhEcYkSe2POBuOMyCgt_1ytCXKTR0qCE1qbWXibPqvbKKEIEhegfamiIEbXBjWVXor8xtgsiaWPW8Vp_KwfD3Tpmlglx)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=04cf0e0aa4b441b08c26f52c928eea43&_e=dXVNsOvvwFRVF-z7hd05wphZno3IqhPwAFbIWsOVPX6PtrU0utB6o2clzZZxw-UDE3-xmgn3FbJl9UT8Z88K3Vf5M-a6KvJgFVonDhdpt63FvA_ICHIbomcGPDm3ypuvBq29kOLlVpNQjsezphCbuz-3933Yfl-JW1f-ZfxPUMuhxlSjxhRciZx2IoFeWUzbT17xXH5KCU3FFI1OHKbwYtlxABh0OOZmoT-2C8MmwMoEZ0uWzm-O1PdohlUnYobVmwZDu1w5hXMGz-BiK6GeLYUV3b0nrYWw-5V6hLeqKOn0j-wVw_L2jxVtgxjcUNOD-T6KoglrWNJkylyuYPkRXf2CO7yn5FFXOg-kBtfyT1gI40sYBSp6NBnSMgtEJpfLYkaAdVyMbPoI2O0m4keOYYJqU6v0RWzsvzCrd3H9CGz-8KHjf9LK3p3ELhz20rTr)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=04cf0e0aa4b441b08c26f52c928eea43&_e=dXVNsOvvwFRVF-z7hd05wphZno3IqhPwAFbIWsOVPX6PtrU0utB6o2clzZZxw-UDE3-xmgn3FbJl9UT8Z88K3Vf5M-a6KvJgFVonDhdpt63FvA_ICHIbomcGPDm3ypuvBq29kOLlVpNQjsezphCbuz-3933Yfl-JW1f-ZfxPUMuhxlSjxhRciZx2IoFeWUzbT17xXH5KCU3FFI1OHKbwYtlxABh0OOZmoT-2C8MmwMoEZ0uWzm-O1PdohlUnYobVmwZDu1w5hXMGz-BiK6GeLffcy2V5iOBhxUUL5FYyHpFp8NNGUzdIRK__dcnxUJJeF9-09GCqVGndDPinQbeUH_cQur99zlyriJjkJXOrE2btQJhf1PapjCRPZjjzZTArUv1vjNtRuHUut-JgyXdD4glGwanKr0jmhb3tm-lv-PXcayiU1feACPLfp-ur5yDB).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Betsy DeVos is awesome
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132932?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Betsy DeVos, the former Education Secretary, was in Jackson this week to speak at a lunch we organized. In front of a large crowd of our supporters, Mrs. DeVos outlined her vision of education freedom in America. **Watch what she had to say by clicking on the image below. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=06609d9528&e=5703353baa)
---
Betsy DeVos speaking in Jackson
| **Mrs. DeVos explained how un-American much of our current education system actually is.** The decision to lockdown schools during COVID, she suggested, proved to be one of the worst decisions ever made by public officials, setting back the education outcomes of a generation of young Americans.

**Too often, classrooms are failing to teach the essentials – yet at the same time they are finding the time to promote radical ‘woke’ ideology to children. **

A passionate advocate for school choice, Mrs. DeVos' new book, _Hostages No More_ , offers a roadmap for the reforms we need. Rather than dwell on what is wrong, she offers an inspiring message.

With the election of Glenn Youngkin in Virginia, a ‘great parental awakening’ is underway. **The education freedom movement is growing at the state-level, and it is happening despite, not because of the federal government.**

West Virginia and Arizona now offer every child an Education Saving Account, which gives mom and dad the freedom to allocate their child’s share of tax dollars to a school of their choice. Last month, Arkansas joined the education freedom revolution, too, with Gov Sarah Huckabee Sanders leading the way.

**If education freedom works in Arkansas, I asked Mrs. DeVos, why can we not see similar reforms introduced on this side of the river in the Magnolia state? **Listen to what she had to say in response.

Here are some photos from our event for you to enjoy!
---
|
---
Mrs. DeVos meets lawmakers Rep Richard Bennett and Rep Dana McLean
|
---
Mrs. DeVos and Mr. Orien Watson
|
---
Mr. and Mrs. Price Johnson, Mrs. DeVos and Mrs. Robbie Hughes
|
---
Mrs. DeVos with Celeste and former US attorney, Mike Hurst
|
---
Mrs. DeVos with Lindsey Beckham of Moms 4 Liberty.
|
---
Mrs. DeVos with Mr. Thomas Colbert
|
---
Mrs. DeVos with Mrs. Gloria Walker
|
---
|
---
Deep in conversation with Kelley Williams Jnr.
|
---
Larry Goldstein and Mrs. DeVos talk school choice
|
---
With Cal Wells, Hu Meena and Morgan Yeates
|
---
With Russ Latino
|
---
Arty and Amy Finkelberg, long-time advocates of education reform in our state
|
---
Claire McGehee, Lindsey Beckham and Mrs. DeVos
|
---
With some of Mississippi's finest
|
---
John and Linda Marchetti
| Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=57f4dea3be&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Allen West
subject: Subject or citizen?
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479687:Jyi9tZG1N:m:1:3365131770:97833FD817942341AF886F8C33FDFB23:r)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479687:Jyi9tZG1N:m:1:3365131770:97833FD817942341AF886F8C33FDFB23:r) Peter, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479687:Jyi9tZG1N:m:1:3365131770:97833FD817942341AF886F8C33FDFB23:r) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare a donation to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479687:Jyi9tZG1N:m:1:3365131770:97833FD817942341AF886F8C33FDFB23:r) If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479687:Jyi9tZG1N:m:1:3365131770:97833FD817942341AF886F8C33FDFB23:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479687:Jyi9tZG1N:m:1:3365131770:97833FD817942341AF886F8C33FDFB23:r)
---
|
---
|
---

Republican extremists already banned or severely limited abortion access in over a dozen states, and now House Republicans are threatening to do everything in their power to take it away at the federal level. **But President Biden has made it clear: abortion rights are non-negotiable.** He's fiercely committed to defending reproductive healthcare and ensuring that _everyone_ has access to safe and legal abortions in the country. We want to show our appreciation for President Biden's unwavering commitment to protecting reproductive freedom. And the best way to do that is by signing a thank-you card. Thanks for your support, Unite the Country

clean_body: For protecting reproductive freedom! | = Peter, the fight for reproductive freedom has never been more urgent. Republican extremists already banned or severely limited abortion access in over a dozen states, and now House Republicans are threatening to do everything in their power to take it away at the federal level. He's fiercely committed to defending reproductive healthcare and ensuring that everyone has access to safe and legal abortions in the country. We want to show our appreciation for President Biden's unwavering commitment to protecting reproductive freedom. And the best way to do that is by signing a thank-you card. Let's send a powerful message to President Biden that we stand with him in the fight for reproductive rights. name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsRmbVHDXN

A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did
Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an
exaggeration. But it makes clear

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRmbVHDXN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

A few
years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did
Everyone Become a Socialist?"

This is,
of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left
in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and
our way of life.

In a
recent issue of Imprimis-Hillsdale College's digest of
liberty-author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of
the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'-a
two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on
top and socialism for the majority below."

Today, as
a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand
the extent of support for-and opposition to-socialism.

Your
input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight
for the future of liberty in our country.

Will you
please share your views on the political, social, and cultural
forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your
National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61627290:sRmbVHDXN:m:3:2532013465:C3AE29B12E67D1D14978476416A94C14:r

Sadly,
socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the
young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that...

. . .
during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those
16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also
increased in popularity among all ages.

Why is
this?

Draconian
government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated
competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream
come true for corporate socialists.

At the
same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what
socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures
wherever it has been tried.

This is a
result of the far-Left's "long march through the
institutions"-including colleges and universities, K-12 schools,
and the media.

Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once
confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race
theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as
school boards and even the military.

But it is
in our schools where the effects of critical race theory-which
teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens
according to race-are most dangerous.

You may
recall that many young Americans with college degrees who
championed socialist policies participated in the riots and
violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020.

In the
face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free
markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and
teach millions has never been more urgently needed.

That's
why I need your thoughts quickly.

By
responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five
days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent
rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach
increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope
to hear from friends representing every part of the country.

Education
is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your
partnership with Hillsdale College is critical.

As
Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure,
the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."

If you
agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey
on Socialism today.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61627290:sRmbVHDXN:m:3:2532013465:C3AE29B12E67D1D14978476416A94C14:r

Despite
the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember-it is
NEVER too late to defend liberty through education.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: My Mother Dorothy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479067:6LqAXZGnN:m:1:3391001263:047D7985888AC98DF056BEDABA81D6BC:r)
---

The values I live by, and the pull I feel toward service, were greatly influenced by my mother, Dorothy Mercer Pompeo.

She was one of ten children born to the most hardworking and community-minded people that I know.

She raised me and my siblings the same way she was raised: **with hard work, commitment to parenthood, and strong family values.**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479067:6LqAXZGnN:m:1:3391001263:047D7985888AC98DF056BEDABA81D6BC:r)
---

Whether it was planning our next trip to see family in Kansas, packing us in the car to a political event, making sure we read books throughout our summer vacation, or attending one of our school programs, _she was a huge influence on why I hold dear all that I do._

**Now, the American values and the way of life I grew up living are disappearing.** The radical Left is taking our country in the completely wrong direction, stripping away our religious roots, our patriotic past, and our never give an inch attitude.

We must fight back to save America as we know it. _**Are you with me?**_

---
| | [SAVE AMERICA](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479067:6LqAXZGnN:m:1:3391001263:047D7985888AC98DF056BEDABA81D6BC:r)
---

_We can 't back down or give in. We have to stay in the fight and stand up for what is right._

We MUST kick Democrats out of power and elect America's first conservatives to save our nation. _**[Please consider chipping in whatever you can today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479067:6LqAXZGnN:m:1:3391001263:047D7985888AC98DF056BEDABA81D6BC:r "Please consider
chipping in whatever you can today.")**_

We cannot give up on America!

Fighting For Our Future,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479067:6LqAXZGnN:m:1:3391001263:047D7985888AC98DF056BEDABA81D6BC:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

name: Gallego For Arizona HQ
subject: Five Paragraph Order: DEADLINE
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the mission and how we’ll accomplish it.
#

**Situation:** We are less than one week away before our FEC fundraising deadline and are short of our goals. This deadline is a critical show of strength for our campaign and everyone will be watching: the press, our opponents, and potential endorsers.
**Mission:** To reach our fundraising goals and file a report that shows a strong grassroots campaign that can win this seat for Democrats.
**Execution:** Because so many of our donations come from lots of people giving small amounts, mostly via email and text, we’re going to have to send a number of messages this week. You don’t have to give to all of them, but we hope you will donate to this one.
**Administration/Logistics:** We’ll check back in on the progress toward our goals and let you know if we hit them. After the deadline ends, we’ll send you a detailed summary of our grassroots support at this point before anyone else gets a chance to see our report filed.
**Command:** The importance of reaching our goal is coming right from Ruben Gallego, who is also working hard to raise more offline.
[**You see our plan. Can you make your first $3 contribution to help us execute and reach our FEC fundraising deadline goals before the month ends? This is the most important deadline of the campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230325-1-30&t=1&akid=491%2E734936%2EMuj_hz)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar23.68dfDh&amount=3&refcode=em230325-1-30&t=2&akid=491%2E734936%2EMuj_hz)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar23.68dfDh&refcode=em230325-1-30&t=3&akid=491%2E734936%2EMuj_hz)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in. We’ll be in touch.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=491%2E734936%2EMuj_hz). name: Team DNC
subject: My insulin story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
It's moments like these where I'm proudest to be a Democrat, and most grateful to have a president so invested in the issues that impact so many Americans. | |
---
Hi there! I’m Michaéla, and I’m one of the folks who sends you emails and texts from the DNC. But today I’m coming to you in my own voice to talk about something very different -- President Biden’s advocacy on insulin pricing. Three years ago, a few months shy of my 25th birthday, I found myself in the emergency room after receiving a scary phone call from my primary care physician who was gravely concerned about some test results. After several terrifying hours in the hospital, doctors gave me the news: I was one of the 1.6 million people in the US living with type 1 diabetes -- an autoimmune condition that destroys the body’s ability to produce insulin. When I received the diagnosis, my first thought -- after my immediate and long-term health -- was the financial burden. I was two years out of college and living on a pretty modest salary. _How would I ever be able to afford to keep myself alive as an insulin-dependent diabetic?_ I was incredibly lucky to have great health insurance that has made living as a diabetic pretty manageable. That said, I’ll never shake the feeling of fear I had in those early days, wondering how I’d possibly afford rent _and_ groceries _and_ insulin. That’s why it meant so much to me when President Biden called on insulin manufacturers to cap the cost at $35/month. The price of insulin has gone up 1000% in the past 30 years. Yes, you read that right: _one thousand percent_. Every month when I pick up my insulin from the pharmacy, I check the list price on the box -- it’s $2,600, and I can’t help but think about folks who don’t have the luxury of good insurance to foot the bill. Earlier this month, Eli Lilly, one of the three largest manufacturers of insulin, announced they’d cap the out-of-pocket cost of their insulin at $35/month. And just last week, Novo Nordisk and Sanofi, two other insulin manufacturers, said they would reduce prices as well. Make no mistake: These changes were a direct result of President Biden calling on drug manufacturers to lower insulin prices for everyone after Democrats passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ to cap insulin costs for seniors on Medicare. **It’s moments like these where I’m proudest to be a member of the Democratic Party -- the party that’s been fighting to make health care more affordable for Americans since the Affordable Care Act thirteen years ago. It is because of supporters like you who helped elect Joe Biden in 2020 that we have a president who is so invested in the issues that matter most.** Thanks for reading, and thanks for being a part of this team! Michaéla Michaéla Finneran
Email & SMS Strategist
Democratic National Committee

subject: ‘That’s his problem, not mine’: Nancy Pelosi lashes out at Archbishop who barred her from communion

body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cb302955ff44acf9326f546fee4dc15&_e=eUWb-3sDjabLSWiiGLc4ewp17fbkQTvZiDLIV3C1gk6eU6ijy1pawznESQeKRRLhPdwrN4dfnzYWXFjT0yeB--Rzqx72HY-eq_Adiyfb2i_YghYmzAGWh79EXO_P5Gd840Gsfl3goekS1k44pViuPKf16U49BduwT6eoST_7xKcxL3EREnPm5bNgmItdNW6kI4PDzwC6qVG8JVcwBII_Q9lxlrOuGEJv82FNgzxVKtp8naevuHT7urHFPLNbBmhRxf2bMG8VxeXXBV-8O5uH6eLjzfvZqFJxFwX-s3-UiPQ3RwCjZaCCjEiqtmYXv69CC9o4LRy9AZkQukWVt36IpxlZXaO89FWzaXtA1KRV8nwVXNnpiwlh_z9_Rl-IB_QSxhkFSZe36PFbrmoCm7xCOA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cb302955ff44acf9326f546fee4dc15&_e=eUWb-3sDjabLSWiiGLc4ewp17fbkQTvZiDLIV3C1gk6eU6ijy1pawznESQeKRRLhPdwrN4dfnzYWXFjT0yeB--Rzqx72HY-eq_Adiyfb2i_YghYmzAGWh79EXO_P5Gd840Gsfl3goekS1k44pViuPKf16U49BduwT6eoST_7xKcxL3EREnPm5bNgmItdNW6kI4PDzwC6qVG8JVcwBII_Q9lxlrOuGEJv82FNgzxVKtp8naevuHT7urHFPLNbBmhRGxpsfumEopnJLuWFBXfF3T6AM04wL1lQ7mZ3-nPbWYCfHJTUkvytHmNIXMLZ6K5eiEAXph7jsf9s7cj4cSwcLsQAUio2o8crzal4X7I0MIvSySNu4FLjInYQ6nt2MrykJ0j3ZtELHvcsYVc0cZbGGg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cb302955ff44acf9326f546fee4dc15&_e=eUWb-3sDjabLSWiiGLc4ewp17fbkQTvZiDLIV3C1gk6eU6ijy1pawznESQeKRRLhPdwrN4dfnzYWXFjT0yeB--Rzqx72HY-eq_Adiyfb2i_YghYmzAGWh79EXO_P5Gd840Gsfl3goekS1k44pViuPKf16U49BduwT6eoST_7xKcxL3EREnPm5bNgmItdNW6kI4PDzwC6qVG8JVcwBII_Q9lxlrOuGEJv82FNgzxVKtp8naevuHT7urHFPLNbBmhRVFtzN-WhW0K3PCA0kHwO5yLiKh8eB64r5_yAI_E0jXnbEzG9Qo2-K2Th2nYxPLrD_CEIgAC6S9eqiHg8eYqyJdNoRcnSZOxjSV5RYtbEqEIpiYYcMx-kEl8pkceWZ2KtSz0fyLzs0-s1wIF-XFNf8w%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Gives
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Giffords.org
subject: Visa, Mastercard, and American Express must have the courage to act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If credit card companies stepped up and began tracking suspicious gun and ammunition purchases, it would save lives.
#

Friends -
Last fall, we ran a campaign to put pressure on companies like Visa, Mastercard, and American Express to flag suspicious gun purchases. The campaign worked, and these companies said that they would begin using a new sales code to track suspicious purchases from gun merchants.
But now, they’re backing down on their word due to resistance from extremist politicians peddling the gun lobby’s dangerous agenda.
It’s shameful that these companies are buckling to political intimidation. We need to fight back and put the pressure on these companies once again to do the right thing and track suspicious gun purchases.
[**Will you donate $3 or any amount you can today to help us keep the pressure on credit card companies to track and flag suspicious gun purchases using merchant codes?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230325-1-30-nor&t=1&akid=4787%2E3935704%2ESDQec6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-mar23.bWo1sU&refcode=em230325-1-30-nor&t=20&akid=4787%2E3935704%2ESDQec6)**

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-mar23.x28Ypi&refcode=em230325-1-30-nor&t=25&akid=4787%2E3935704%2ESDQec6)**
---
****
In 2017, the deadliest mass shooting in modern American history took place in Las Vegas, Nevada. Sixty people were killed, and many others were injured.
What you may not know is that over the course of 12 months prior to the shooting, the perpetrator of the Las Vegas massacre charged $94,000 worth of guns and ammunition used in that mass shooting to his credit cards.
If credit card companies stepped up and began tracking suspicious gun and ammunition purchases, it could truly save lives and prevent the next devastating mass shooting from happening.
[**So please: Chip in $3 today to help us keep advocating for credit card companies to track and flag suspicious gun and ammunition purchases.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230325-1-30-nor&t=26&akid=4787%2E3935704%2ESDQec6)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230325-1-30-nor&t=27&akid=4787%2E3935704%2ESDQec6)**
Thank you for supporting this important effort,
The Giffords Team

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Big tech must be held accountable

body:
here’s how we’re reforming the tech industry

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60708661/397991308/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYwNzQ2ZS0xN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TAlR4svthAMKJpEL6y_WvI-E1tG_UJGfANWYn10typM=&emci=95241e63-bbc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5bf0746e-17cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Yesterday, I wrote to you about my comprehensive, bipartisan plan to address TikTok and the next generation of foreign technology threats. Now today, I want to take a moment to tell you about how else I’m working to hold Big Tech accountable. This work isn’t _just_ about TikTok, it’s about safeguarding our national security and making the internet a safer, fairer place. As Big Tech’s power over our economy, our private data, and how we use the internet becomes more and more alarming, I’m fighting to reform the tech industry – but I can’t do it alone. **_[**Can you donate anything you can afford right now to support my work to protect you, your privacy, and your data?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60708662/397991309/1731576687?refcode=mw_em_230325_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYwNzQ2ZS0xN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TAlR4svthAMKJpEL6y_WvI-E1tG_UJGfANWYn10typM=)_** Here are just a few of the bills I’ve introduced to get this done:
* My _SAFE TECH Act_ would reform “Section 230,” a law that shields tech companies from liability for harms that take place on their platforms. The bill finally holds tech giants accountable for harmful, often criminal behavior – dangerous scams, harassment, or violent extremism – that they tolerate on their platforms.
* For many tech companies, their top priority is accessing Americans’ private data, while Americans lack the ability to move their private data to apps and platforms with stronger privacy protections. My bipartisan _ACCESS Act_ would give folks more control over their online interactions by requiring large platforms to allow users to move their data to third-party moderation services.
* And my _Honest Ads Act_ brings long-overdue transparency and accountability to online political ads by requiring platforms to abide by the same disclosure requirements as broadcasters for online political advertising and take active steps to combat foreign elections interference.

I’m also using my platform in the Senate to push powerful tech companies to take responsibility for harms committed on their platforms. For example, I recently pressed Meta to step up and make needed investments to combat hate globally, knowing that Facebook has continuously fueled and amplified racial, religious, and ethnic violence across the world. From greater clarity about data collection to holding platforms accountable for fraudulent political advertising, I’m fighting to build a more transparent, equitable internet, because you deserve to be safe online. **_[**If you agree, join me by chipping in $5 or more right now to support my work to control the enormous power Big Tech holds over our lives >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60708663/397991310/1731576687?refcode=mw_em_230325_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYwNzQ2ZS0xN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TAlR4svthAMKJpEL6y_WvI-E1tG_UJGfANWYn10typM=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ** ** ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60708664/397991311/1731576687?refcode=mw_em_230325_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYwNzQ2ZS0xN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TAlR4svthAMKJpEL6y_WvI-E1tG_UJGfANWYn10typM=)**** ** **

clean_body: | Team — Did you see Sharice’s note? If it wasn’t clear already, the 2024 race has officially begun and we have a lot to do — starting with hitting our first major fundraising goal of the year. Can we count on you to help us hit $20,000 raised this week so we can have a strong fundraising report when our numbers go public next week? = Begin Forwarded Message: Hi, I need to reach you before the weekend. It’s been a busy few weeks for our campaign, and the stakes for 2024 keep getting higher. First, our campaign was added to the Democrats’ Frontline program — a list of the most competitive Democratic seats in 2024. Then, Republicans officially labeled my seat in Congress as one of their top targets in next year’s election. Now, we have our first public Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly filing deadline of the year coming up one week from today and we need your help to have a strong report when our numbers go public. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Marriage equality, climate action, creating thousands of new jobs, improving our supply chains, lowering the costs of prescription drugs, winning tough races... This team has accomplished a lot. As we look towards building our campaign for 2024, I know we can win if our team once again puts the pedal to the metal. = Thanks, Sharice | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

Peter,

This is Congressman Sanford Bishop, and I’m teaming up with The Collective PAC ahead of our critical end-of-quarter deadlines. [To help us in our mission, can you split a contribution between the Collective PAC and me to help us reach our goals and fuel our missions? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3S5fj0Bee52zeEzNCozNNgHZGJsVHzbwHdhDxHssCOMBEmvlgK8YAOgi4a-vTtjm6L3gUTREhqzKApzAfc10r8Q3Qy0K4MvHiP5iZ_DQ7jYTN_CwsxA1rewfsgG_UqTm6f8F5EeUDuwcVwd3MQQ749ijk1T-0l9nNLyFOrjqmbTWVO2WGvr0HnC4lUlgI1vCqy-RljBMN3GlTVvQrYKZnh5VhjTsQZNAwu1_Vz8tRf9CDinYfjro1cMLTNp8WWgHt0dttbdL7ZsOgOE6Pv1abSsO5awPFHjSIKSjCaLZ_gGHH1DctLXru6OiJbVVNqzcqke85ysKZetTsekYBkAVa0G9ByLNbJoZN0_78Y0TdN0H4ubpDiPux7D1m45aHv2n-eSvg8NZp3yWhiBvhRkA4KiUoVC4ayo5HRW6-k7A_ozdB8zOj23b0heM7lcz1m_Wcseu2VDxIGxirAXjnYvxXV/3us/7p2kvqMfQgyTRRFMoGsyfA/h2/6q5f--SD2Wy8kgO_m8dCySwYPxncT71_Ay-HRgTpF9k)

In Congress, I’m fighting for federal voting rights legislation. And in communities across the country, The Collective PAC is doing the critical work of educating voters and recruiting candidates. **Both of our missions do this: strengthen our democracy.**

Over the last decade, we’ve seen voting rights come under attack nationwide as states pass voter suppression laws. These pieces of anti-voting legislation are creating longer voting lines, fewer polling locations, and more ways for ballots to be thrown out. **Ultimately, they are designed to make it harder for millions of people — _especially_ people of color — to cast their vote. **

I’m fighting to protect the right to vote so that every eligible voter has access to the ballot box, and The Collective PAC is doing critical work to reach voters and recruit candidates so we can _finally_ reach equitable political representation.

[But our fight is only as strong as the grassroots support behind it, Peter. Last cycle, I faced the most competitive election challenge of my entire career. In order to prepare for the next cycle, will you split a contribution between The Collective PAC and me so we can reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goals and continue empowering voters? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3S5fj0Bee52zeEzNCozNNgHZGJsVHzbwHdhDxHssCOMBEmvlgK8YAOgi4a-vTtjm6L3gUTREhqzKApzAfc10r8Q3Qy0K4MvHiP5iZ_DQ7jYTN_CwsxA1rewfsgG_UqTm6f8F5EeUDuwcVwd3MQQ749ijk1T-0l9nNLyFOrjqmbTWVO2WGvr0HnC4lUlgI1vCqy-RljBMN3GlTVvQrYKZnhZOaGLOyf6-1pTl_BeaKbKuS71cGwO9gEYkMPz63Rwv0fnLLu_Ch-HwbVzn9NIkw6JDFPclySzfj4yN-0oAbxlza_dY9cwDdb5MaHAnxxL9Vig0gUkjDwclzy0g2TDEQFn9BVcdgT7FTMw_h_xWRpxA7zG0azOZ-NMWuRCBBVxEBau7k4eECKUPCdgUmfJM-AJIjWyiNRtaYvIiUuwkTG58vPclB7PBwfOW0FwoT2zdEtmB_t8rwQml0MUutTjYUw/3us/7p2kvqMfQgyTRRFMoGsyfA/h3/gK5co7xyaueSDlLIMICxKKHxtKHPa4U2sJd3Al5VXy8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Sanford Bishop and The Collective PAC.
