[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1BgbGqLfR7ZlIft0tuHmzl7du1RwaD_8ebYlzoHUF9eokUS7iwT316geRGOClJAr4pv5cfc43Q65SVQ3_jikOZSfyH-Wx-5MtQxMyDopOMKoLUBOi_WXRNb9_1SW7QgIbRXB2rUinpgyQ1qo2DiwxLFN3Si2aHL174D9Gy-StySs5lTtYMrV2LFgKnncvAmL57FGVB_3GzQ9K78958VGYG-XyOzPH4nJmjvSmEEBmXOg7Rm7YQfXe7LIutSRl1P3S0Kt7JYzctzghk5_GycB02jlkwjgcyeVlIc1gWdj91vRVS241K6cE-ofiuX5NgYwj0BAOVs7P1-JCINnonUYmNh8HN0X2xwp8giBvHD_hYR5X47X3zQqPBRrJrQ_J3yszwcNWpgsyczw8Etj5ilwhsedQOM8P1n7B3UWYZBdXwf1_lQmUvCMBIst6T2LnTDvk/3us/7p2kvqMfQgyTRRFMoGsyfA/h10/V6NTNNYPWl9L9YWz_YvPfkM_pbFa1971CwxIV3FH0gs) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. clean_body: Over the last decade, we’ve seen voting rights come under attack nationwide as states pass voter suppression laws. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, This is Congressman Sanford Bishop, and I’m teaming up with The Collective PAC ahead of our critical end-of-quarter deadlines. In Congress, I’m fighting for federal voting rights legislation. And in communities across the country, The Collective PAC is doing the critical work of educating voters and recruiting candidates. Both of our missions do this: strengthen our democracy. Over the last decade, we’ve seen voting rights come under attack nationwide as states pass voter suppression laws. These pieces of anti-voting legislation are creating longer voting lines, fewer polling locations, and more ways for ballots to be thrown out. Ultimately, they are designed to make it harder for millions of people — especially people of color — to cast their vote. I’m fighting to protect the right to vote so that every eligible voter has access to the ballot box, and The Collective PAC is doing critical work to reach voters and recruit candidates so we can finally reach equitable political representation. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Sanford Bishop and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Congressman Sanford D. Bishop, Jr. The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Republicans want the price of insulin to go back up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
They're seeking to repeal the Inflation Reduction Act.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60710346/397997733/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEyYjY5Yy0xYmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5qf18GjFZYSp8plXUdKcJ4C3q2_j6r8sI_dtskVgIc=)
---
In the last Congress, I voted for historic legislation that lowered the cost of prescription drugs.

As a result of the Inflation Reduction Act, the price of insulin was capped at just $35 per month for those on Medicare, and the government gained greater power to negotiate for lower prices on other drugs and crack down on companies that have price-gouged Americans for far too long. **We're already seeing major drug manufacturers like Eli Lilly respond to the public pressure of the new law by dramatically reducing insulin prices for all consumers.**

The legislation we fought so hard for has delivered a real and positive change for millions of people. **Naturally, some House Republicans want to repeal the Inflation Reduction Act and side with Big Pharma over the American people.**

[**Will you stand with me today and make it clear that we won't let the GOP undo the progress we've made? Sign your name to support the Inflation Reduction Act and its historic capping of drug prices.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60710347/397997734/1687919733?ms=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEyYjY5Yy0xYmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5qf18GjFZYSp8plXUdKcJ4C3q2_j6r8sI_dtskVgIc=&emci=976c4871-8bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2aa2b69c-1bcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60710348/397997735/1687919733?ms=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEyYjY5Yy0xYmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5qf18GjFZYSp8plXUdKcJ4C3q2_j6r8sI_dtskVgIc=&emci=976c4871-8bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2aa2b69c-1bcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) The House Freedom Caucus — a key group of MAGA-aligned Republicans whose votes were critical in getting Kevin McCarthy the votes he needed for the Speakership — recently outlined a plan that would roll back the main provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act. If they succeed, Americans would see insulin prices go back _up_.

The Inflation Reduction Act is one of the many things Republicans want to put on the chopping block as they play dangerous political games with government funding and the debt ceiling. We need to show them that their position is untenable and unpopular _across the board_.

[**That's why I need as many signatures on this petition as possible. Will you sign on today and help us reach at least 5,000?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60710349/397997736/1687919733?ms=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEyYjY5Yy0xYmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5qf18GjFZYSp8plXUdKcJ4C3q2_j6r8sI_dtskVgIc=&emci=976c4871-8bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2aa2b69c-1bcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60710350/397997737/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230325PD_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEyYjY5Yy0xYmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5qf18GjFZYSp8plXUdKcJ4C3q2_j6r8sI_dtskVgIc=)****

name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

My favorite part of campaigning is getting to meet people and hear what’s
on their minds. Hearing their challenges, their passions, what brings them
joy, and what motivates them to get involved – this is what I LOVE to do!
And it’s these stories and priorities I’ll be taking with me to the
Senate.

We’ve already hit dozens of stops on our California for All tour since we
launched our Senate campaign, with no plans to slow down anytime soon.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]I want to share with you what I’m hearing at these campaign stops, and
I’m hoping you’ll chip in a few bucks at the end to keep us out on the
road in the weeks and months ahead!

🌳 There’s no doubt about it — the climate crisis is here, and California
is bearing the brunt of its effects. This year alone, folks in our state
have faced historic winter storms and devastating flash floods — and
wildfire season will be here soon. That’s why I’m a champion for the Green
New Deal, a comprehensive plan to invest in clean energy and create
millions of green, new jobs to save our planet and bolster our economy.

📚 Meeting college students is always inspiring. Our future is in good
hands with this next generation. But young people deserve to be set up for
success as they finish up school — not saddled with crippling student loan
debt. It’s high time we cancel student debt for millions of Americans and
make college affordable, as I told students at UC Davis and UC San Diego.

🏘️ Housing that’s affordable in California is hard to find. In meetings
with constituents, mayors, state legislators, and voters, I’ve been told
countless times how unaffordable housing costs are for hardworking
families. In Congress, I’ve worked to secure funding for housing and to
get people off the street, and I’ll do just the same in the Senate.

💕 I met with local leaders in the LGBTQ community in San Francisco and Los
Angeles and heard the profound concerns raised over the attack on equal
rights. Right-wing extremists have been relentless in going after trans
kids and the LGBTQ community. It’s time for us all to step up and defend
the most vulnerable citizens among us in the trans community, and to
continue the fight for equality.

💰 I met with workers in coffee shops and restaurants around the state who
told me that their wages just aren’t keeping up with the cost of life.
They can’t afford their rent, eggs, and medicine. We need to create an
economy that works for everyone — not just those at the top.

Derek, these are only a handful of the issues people brought up
on the road — and with every handshake and conversation, I learn more
about the unique problems people in our state are facing.

I’m ready to get back out on the road to keep up these conversations and
address these issues head-on. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]Will you chip in $3 or more today so we
can keep adding stops to our California for All tour?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dZVEvl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em.7h-CrL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=mar2023_abs_em.o650ZW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em.5OS6KE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks, Derek — I hope I get to stop by your area soon enough
on my tour!

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em.4Qw1zC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230325_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1995%2E5257348%2ECJuWn_ ]Privacy Policy

body:
Expanding the electorate is a year-round thing, and with year-round work requires year-round funding.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60710441/397998237/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230325CritFollow_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMDIyYzcwLTFjY2ItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ph4ChMt3F70IU_kH-XvklcCttDriVmK1HR6xEApQBq4=)
| Fellow activist,

**We aren’t going to lie to you, fellow activist. Our critical budget shortfall is getting to a seriously concerning point.**

We are just under a week away from the end of the quarter, and just over a month away from the deadline to register voters in time for Pennsylvania’s 2023 primary elections.

We knew fundraising would slow down somewhat for the “off-year,” but raising less than one-sixth as much as we had at this point last year is a **big problem** for an organization like ours.

Your investment will:
\- Support hiring and training full-time staff in our focus regions across the Commonwealth (Allegheny, Dauphin, Cumberland, Lehigh, Lancaster, Berks, Monroe, Northampton, Montgomery, Bucks, Chester, Delaware and Philadelphia counties).
\- Register voters in historically disenfranchised communities including; Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth.
\- Organize and host community engagement events in our focus regions including community conversations and town halls.
\- Outreach to our registered voters to be sure they have the necessary information to make their voices heard in the May 16th Primary and November election. **[We’re working to expand the electorate and mobilize voters to get out and vote in every election, twice a year, and we need year-round funding to carry it out. Will you pitch in $10 right now to help us keep up this vital clean_body: Expanding the electorate is a year-round thing, and with year-round work requires year-round funding. = | Fellow activist, We aren’t going to lie to you, fellow activist. Our critical budget shortfall is getting to a seriously concerning point. We are just under a week away from the end of the quarter, and just over a month away from the deadline to register voters in time for Pennsylvania’s 2023 primary elections. We knew fundraising would slow down somewhat for the “off-year,” but raising less than one-sixth as much as we had at this point last year is a big problem for an organization like ours. Your investment will: \- Support hiring and training full-time staff in our focus regions across the Commonwealth (Allegheny, Dauphin, Cumberland, Lehigh, Lancaster, Berks, Monroe, Northampton, Montgomery, Bucks, Chester, Delaware and Philadelphia counties). \- Register voters in historically disenfranchised communities including; Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. \- Organize and host community engagement events in our focus regions including community conversations and town halls. \- Outreach to our registered voters to be sure they have the necessary information to make their voices heard in the May 16th Primary and November election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we're making great progress toward our goal. However, we still need 15 more donors to stay on track for where we need to be, especially after being named a “Frontline” race! As you know, every contribution counts, no matter how big or small. name: Adam Schiff (via RBG)
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16025?t=6&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy) Hey there,

In a moment, I’m going to [**ask you to split a small donation between Ron Be Gone and our campaign ahead of our FEC deadline.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16027?t=8&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy) But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.

I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate a little more than a month ago. From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.

It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.

Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.

Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show. At this point, he attacks me about once a week on the air.

Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.

And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.

It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.

**Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.**

It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.

Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.

[**Look, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Ron Be Gone and our campaign before our FEC deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way:**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16027?t=10&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16033?t=16&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16034?t=17&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16035?t=18&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy)
Thank you for your support,

—Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1732%2E564421%2E6f3ETy).**

Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies. It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor. Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down. name: Aruna Miller
subject: The women who came before me
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711246/398001365/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGE5MzVmZi0xZGNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kfpb7cqP6YC00ReuKVmFalD_cCyBx-GsKC8nmmxx0oc=&emci=b2bdc9b9-71c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d0a935ff-1dcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Hi friends, Before Women’s History Month ends, I wanted to reach out. Our campaign made history last November in more ways than one, and I am forever honored that you elected me to become Maryland’s first South Asian woman Lieutenant Governor. I would not be here today without the hard work and sacrifice of so many women who came before me. Two of those women are my Grandma Sasha and my mom, Hema: my first loves. |
---
My mother and Wes’ mother, Joy, are two immigrant mothers who did everything in their power to give their children the promise of a fulfilling life. Because of them, we are here today fighting for the rights and wellbeing of women across Maryland.
---
When I was seven years old, my family moved from India to the United States, and since then, I’ve never stopped being excited for the promise of America. That’s why I dedicated myself to public service — to never stop fighting to make sure that promise is available to _everyone._
I’m committed to using my platform as Maryland’s Lieutenant Governor to defend every woman’s reproductive rights, close the gender pay gap, and break down systemic barriers that prevent women and marginalized groups from achieving their full potential.
It is the greatest privilege of my life to serve beside Wes, an ally and advocate for women, passing policies and legislation to lift every woman up across this great state.
To the mothers, daughters, sisters, and friends who inspire us every day, we see you. We appreciate you. We celebrate you.
Happy Women’s History Month, and thank you for everything you do.
— Aruna

Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

Our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 is right around the corner and with this news, we need to put out the best report possible! Can you help us raise $3,500 before the end of the month to put out a strong Q1 fundraising report and STOP the NRCC? | | | = Peter, The National Republican Campaign Committee (NRCC) has added Wiley’s seat to their pickup list. They are hoping to flip NC completely RED. We’re fighting back, and we need your help. = = The first FEC deadline of the year is always a big deal. Being added to the NRCC’s pickup list is, too. We need to show them that Wiley has a strong support system behind him and set the expectation that this is NOT their year to win. They want to expand their House majority, and we want to take it back. Holding on to Wiley’s seat in 2024 is essential to helping Democrats flip the House and continue delivering on behalf of the American people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much, Team Wiley Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. name: Letitia James
subject: Join my focus group, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711355/398001931/-1997846888?code=jtk1033-su-nd&refcode=jtk1033-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhjOTc2YS0xZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq5Dy4IUYrNe9nZ0CBt6iVcSAQvrYQ2MC1BsTuwNZo=)
---
**Peter, you were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group. **
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711356/398001932/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1033-su-nd&refcode=jtk1033-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhjOTc2YS0xZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq5Dy4IUYrNe9nZ0CBt6iVcSAQvrYQ2MC1BsTuwNZo=&emci=f2c31793-5bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=038c976a-1ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: 128810098 **PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: **NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711357/398001933/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1033-su-nd&refcode=jtk1033-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhjOTc2YS0xZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq5Dy4IUYrNe9nZ0CBt6iVcSAQvrYQ2MC1BsTuwNZo=&emci=f2c31793-5bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=038c976a-1ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
**This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 723 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance.****[_Please, will you participate in my focus group now so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a moment of your time. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711358/398001934/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1033-su-nd&refcode=jtk1033-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhjOTc2YS0xZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq5Dy4IUYrNe9nZ0CBt6iVcSAQvrYQ2MC1BsTuwNZo=&emci=f2c31793-5bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=038c976a-1ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711359/398001935/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1033-su-nd&refcode=jtk1033-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhjOTc2YS0xZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq5Dy4IUYrNe9nZ0CBt6iVcSAQvrYQ2MC1BsTuwNZo=&emci=f2c31793-5bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=038c976a-1ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60711360/398001936/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1033-su-nd&refcode=jtk1033-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhjOTc2YS0xZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq5Dy4IUYrNe9nZ0CBt6iVcSAQvrYQ2MC1BsTuwNZo=&emci=f2c31793-5bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=038c976a-1ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Judge Andrew Oldham’s opinion Thursday, joined in whole or in part .. | How Communist China Does Your Thinking for You On November 28, 2020, Di Dongsheng, vice dean of the School of International Relations at Renmin University in Beijing, gave a videotaped lecture in which .. | P.O. Something for you to chew on, Derek.

Governor Tim Walz, a 24-year Veteran of the Army National Guard and a VoteVets endorsee, signed a bill providing free meals for students in Minnesota’s public schools. Something that will have an immediate, positive impact on these children’s lives. Something good.
Now, here’s a headline from Arkansas:

Trump’s former White House Press Secretary, Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders, signed a sweeping education bill that — insanely — loosens child labor laws.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: I will not back down amidst attempts to silence me and others in the movement for Palestinian rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvCJ1EfvBtD6Y39BDeUYrzsUniz-o91VJ3ZPuKVKP_iaTXr3o_l74o8mDsFzLhvjuOuMAkaC7atUbWJcPDApzGfIWiq2ORpm6R6VPiSHCU2kqTo6DQSc-n5Qej0t5kGuJb_rjT0j4BhkB1C2HPCo-xQj5wEin-J1cSIw7GU3XWlyWk9NlKyfUuKZa73pSHQ3aqDdxsOhNG8ysPrrPBMOjgrDqUEjd-vxRMtScWgiMqfGA/3us/ctB5MCx6SauYSd3faDtvyw/h0/WksYjH8bNEK6LX_41-dsB3Hh_vKiOHgIsl525pZwgRM)
---
Friend, Recently, a right-wing operative targeted me at a town hall I hosted in my district about the massive power outages our communities have experienced. **He shouted at me to “Go back to Palestine.”** Our town hall brought together communities across our district who are eager to work together for reliable and affordable utilities for their families and neighbors. But we were interrupted by an attempt to sow hate and division. **This attack was hurtful, reminding me of Trump’s calls for me and my Squad sisters to “go back” to where we came from -- even though I was born and raised in Detroit.** I’m from here, I belong here, and I’m here to stay. I will never back down. I am going to outwork the hate and keep pushing forward against those that promote racism and division. [**Will you chip in $5 or more today to have my back in the face of xenophobic, anti-Palestinian attacks?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuZh7t9HuqlQ5e0RoUveYkRRMXXdkkB3KxiPv62UFjIcYtKnjAQNBwJU6XlKIurdPoSg4hfaH7j1zONvSjTcU-OIU8gI2mlb4cqdDe7APaTSZMUoiM_DiA76Tep1v3c8IkbfqY_UkmzXGnSwdSKcTlc3aF86QLb5TWBl9fW03wwdWNZfpNDkFQIzf_GyjJWlExf546C5fXF1EWVCTUksRPDiSw6OiMkGNFz602B9w825hTAdRQrBEc7C74PPelgR4kVtaZFSdUgNVSI67H_S1XV0cSDPs9BylhkKI-pmnf_QhitHhRT5iZDcQw-zdmSe30abaeyDln3kk68dMdAa3Gmgf68Rqyudq6LOKYggwa6y-PNg-yPQVDiCMDZa3IvG2DufxOBQYSgjO_e3WrI0UW/3us/ctB5MCx6SauYSd3faDtvyw/h1/vTy9BziWnPcuSjgn-Ti6pNfRoMF16zWkRTivNnUx7NI) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuZh7t9HuqlQ5e0RoUveYkRRMXXdkkB3KxiPv62UFjIVdgkaKUqBA5_jsBSSSmnWifZ-EMRI_0w_zRiy2B13FGHvtWzyPPpVXoIL_gh9rl9H9gimAYCd_7Iq8KyItNv_HZtqzxmQ9NKTID_XRZ8c0Wsct6R-3Op5TDSoZlEj6vCKJpxvSidx59024FktmujcBt1U5iwLRe5DvXd1BRE5Xg9lPmOCLB_xUppM1GQV5hAX4PnW-iNuGOlnj1T4phvwEQDb4Y42eV5uQG0dWLtvSn-7ZPVOAB-BUvk_8C3q568cTFj4D8c5hdZMDdfoEMfZzeaJFUX0gh5z-bFI5gFhhgY57rtkP9oflNdFWI2YoPvfSTKFefnHMLSOBklli8Yj7r93ZZmq8IRNl6Z-symDXr/3us/ctB5MCx6SauYSd3faDtvyw/h2/PSjB7eFf00fH13pe27ot1HuJfK_EIJtas3JmUPSvRU8)
---
**I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine.**

During my first term in Congress, I tried to visit my grandmother and meet with human rights groups in Palestine. But the Israeli government barred me from entering. After international outcry, the government made my ability to visit my family contingent upon my signing a letter that I would only see my family, and in return, not shed light on the injustices happening in Israel. But I will not be silenced.
Visiting my grandmother under such oppressive conditions meant to humiliate me would break my grandmother's heart, so I decided not to go. I was devastated. And unfortunately, many Palestinians, Arabs, and Muslims are regularly blocked from going to (or “back to”) Palestine.
Israel’s apartheid government also blocks Palestinians from traveling. I have been through checkpoints with my grandmother in the occupied West Bank as the Israeli military interrogates her, simply for trying to seek services such as healthcare.
**This is personal for me. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I regularly face attacks for my defense of Palestinian human rights -- including from my fellow members of Congress.**
Palestinians deserve human dignity, as do we all. I will keep fighting for human rights in my district, in Palestine, and around the world.
[**Please chip in what you can afford today to show that we will not let hate divide us. Instead, we will keep joining together in the movement for human rights for all people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuZh7t9HuqlQ5e0RoUveYkRRMXXdkkB3KxiPv62UFjIcc5DyyKdftC3JRE4LRhVe7IZaaAlo3qeJ4CRkSWDpcM4bw3_J_6zKWvJoqpRhp7xGF2F__sHAiL82lXcac_QFQoZY9pePjVdktkVwk3sD83tektdxhrb0MVI6b0KDAl_uH1OQOgg7aP_2OIkJOkZ1wQ68MSNicAzhfBJwCSGBZG9MSyHn887l4sqQMDOiLpJmeG_OvlLv8q2KsEsA5KGx-yayFicjYRsLCdXOg00_u4_otkHN3DgwLUIwiSCOTQ_r4Xy1UkHVADrvYg-NX3lf9YPJaVoR1TCt2lZLxcojqdt_z9rcsO-E1z1-mODjKGDIRIM5LeqYDkfqb8Ty32OVbV-Y3nhXKBnVSUcXZxvpx5/3us/ctB5MCx6SauYSd3faDtvyw/h3/RWAgvRBN_qX7ramT2bmWBj65sQfpUSqBLJZodtu4_yw)

clean_body: I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine. | | | Friend, Recently, a right-wing operative targeted me at a town hall I hosted in my district about the massive power outages our communities have experienced. He shouted at me to “Go back to Palestine.” Our town hall brought together communities across our district who are eager to work together for reliable and affordable utilities for their families and neighbors. But we were interrupted by an attempt to sow hate and division. This attack was hurtful, reminding me of Trump’s calls for me and my Squad sisters to “go back” to where we came from -- even though I was born and raised in Detroit. I’m from here, I belong here, and I’m here to stay. I will never back down. I am going to outwork the hate and keep pushing forward against those that promote racism and division. | I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine. During my first term in Congress, I tried to visit my grandmother and meet with human rights groups in Palestine. But the Israeli government barred me from entering. After international outcry, the government made my ability to visit my family contingent upon my signing a letter that I would only see my family, and in return, not shed light on the injustices happening in Israel. But I will not be silenced. Visiting my grandmother under such oppressive conditions meant to humiliate me would break my grandmother's heart, so I decided not to go. I was devastated. And unfortunately, many Palestinians, Arabs, and Muslims are regularly blocked from going to (or “back to”) Palestine. Israel’s apartheid government also blocks Palestinians from traveling. I have been through checkpoints with my grandmother in the occupied West Bank as the Israeli military interrogates her, simply for trying to seek services such as healthcare. This is personal for me. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I regularly face attacks for my defense of Palestinian human rights -- including from my fellow members of Congress. Palestinians deserve human dignity, as do we all. I will keep fighting for human rights in my district, in Palestine, and around the world. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being by my side. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | | What these Liberals are doing to President Donald Trump makes me mad as a hornet.

And according to the latest reports, he could be INDICTED AT ANY MOMENT.

_It 's a national disgrace!_

_**[Now we have a choice to make: we can either get mad and stew... or we can do something about it. I'm searching high and low for more patriotic conservatives to help defend President Trump.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479410:6oIUxZGzN:m:1:3331421248:F6D1D6527B845E79A4116DF1D9405BB9:r "Now we have a choice to make: we can either get mad and stew... or we can do something

**These Liberals want President Trump arrested, handcuffed, and perp-walked for maximum public humiliation. I 'm not about to let this happen - and I'm giving you the opportunity to fight back too.**

This is what I'm willing to offer you:

If you agree to help BEFORE President Trump is arrested, I'll make sure your name is sent directly to him. The President will be able to see your name as one of the patriotic conservatives who supported him when he needed it the most.

_How does that sound? _

These Liberals think they can pull a political STUNT like this without any consequences. They're dead wrong. Now, we need your help before it's too late.

Please remember this... You have the chance to do the right thing during one of the most perilous times in our history. President Trump needs us to speak out - for his sake, and for the sake of our country.

_**[If you take this chance, I'll see to it that the President has DIRECT ACCESS to see your name.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479410:6oIUxZGzN:m:1:3331421248:F6D1D6527B845E79A4116DF1D9405BB9:r "If you take this

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

body:
| | | Peter, Three years after the COVID epidemic shut down America, the truth is FINALLY coming out - **COVID was, in all likelihood, a lab leak from communist China.**

**But even while true Americans are fighting to uncover the truth, Dr. Fauci is STILL covering for the Chinese Communist Party’s and saying it was “completely natural.” **

**China lied and Americans died, and it’s time to hold both Communist China AND Dr. Fauci accountable for LYING to the American people.**

[**Stand with me today to DEMAND accountability for the COVID disaster from our enemies both at home and abroad!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=f8f8162fca4d421fb045c6d3b99504d1&_e=cTbLXamSP9AAs-E8B2RVexslhzzdRZW_r7dKxbaGVhg2fprqcvEjKeMWFHJ3VdA_la7JYxqdFiCSvomU3BfIZ5H8J-bnb0mwsmOgHrh-Nzi5FFv5K2q4lArqM70rU8GSpvwRlzMM46CBtDyMR9c1kJIjyHWYFz9ypc98QIN6PRbvEHprobA7tx6usbWcxR04LN913huipnO19zBf9wq9JwsZEoqDQOom11qT8XUUE0g7p_FovYmAMjpzCy3oauokci8UdbdiEHMlAaVs21JlbgC-xPgiCsFr29siFzfNASfCkptKyNRubHR0ngsW2ho3AdedziXTbElG0pce35cpaLw5C-TscJmmtHa2fmk2mJUA-Z9CUz0TrXoE7Ma_G642)

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: Social Security news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **ALERT: Experts warn that Social Security could be on the Supreme Court's chopping block**

_We urgently need to know where you stand on this issue -- but we have**NO RECORD** of your answer:_

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10251%2E9716520%2E7WB00n)
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10251%2E9716520%2E7WB00n)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10251%2E9716520%2E7WB00n)
---

Team -- By overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court has proven that **_NOTHING_** is safe from the conservative justices' right-wing majority.

**In fact, experts warn that Social Security could be in danger, too.** During her confirmation hearings, Amy Coney Barrett famously REFUSED to say if Social Security was constitutional -- and if the Court strikes it down, **_65 million Americans_ will LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t risk losing this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support upholding Social Security -- _but we’re still short 22 responses in Pennsylvania! _

**Please, answer before midnight:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10251%2E9716520%2E7WB00n)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12268?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230325-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10251%2E9716520%2E7WB00n)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: In just three days, Democrats are facing a must-win special election to defend a seat in the Virginia Senate. | | | | | ⏰There are ONLY three days until our next special election in the Virginia Senate! ⏰ From defending a Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania House to gaining more seats in the New Hampshire House (making our margin just THREE seats!), state Dems continue to secure important victories. But, we can’t lose momentum now. There are still nearly a dozen races that are coming up and those could impact our chamber margins – so we need to be as prepared as we can. Here’s the truth: Special elections can protect and expand our majorities in state legislatures or give state Republicans more power to green light their extremist agenda. And, Republicans have already started to do just that: 🔴 In Virginia, GOP legislators are laser-focused on banning abortion. 🔴 Meanwhile, South Carolina Republicans proposed a bill that could make getting an abortion result in the death penalty. 🔴 And in New Hampshire, GOP legislators are introducing harmful anti-trans bills. We need to do everything we can to fight back against this extremism. Often, special elections come down to just a handful of votes, so it's critical we invest our time and resources TODAY. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you! DLCC Special Elections Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In just six days, we’ll hit our first quarter deadline of 2023. We have
just $10,300 to go to hit our goal. We did the math, and based on our
average donation, we need 599 donations to hit this goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132171?refcode=em20230325-28154&t=1001&akid=28154%2E1203867%2Ep9XQeb ]Peter, can you
be one of the 599 people we need to step up in the next six days so we can
recruit and support as many progressive candidates as possible?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132171?refcode=em20230325-28154&t=1002&akid=28154%2E1203867%2Ep9XQeb ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132171?refcode=em20230325-28154&t=1021&akid=28154%2E1203867%2Ep9XQeb ]Contribute $3

We set this ambitious goal because we know what it means to have people
like AOC, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and Jamaal Bowman in Congress. Our
progress depends on electing more visionary leaders who have lived the
same struggles as the people they seek to represent.

We’ve identified a group of five incumbents all of whom are corporate
democrats supported by corporate PACs. If we can put progressives in these
seats, that's one step closer to Medicare for All, a Green New Deal,
canceling student debt, and so much more.

Your support will allow us to find and support the best candidates and
make sure they have the best chance to go up against the political
establishment — and win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132171?refcode=em20230325-28154&t=1022&akid=28154%2E1203867%2Ep9XQeb ]Please make an end-of-quarter donation today and be one of the 599
people we need to reach our goal.

Thank you for getting us to this point. We appreciate all your support.

Team Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230325-28154-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28154_1203867_p9XQeb&akid=28154%2E1203867%2Ep9XQeb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28154%2E1203867%2Ep9XQeb

body:
Here is what your contribution means for our campaign:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60713000/398008251/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDkwYzNmYi0yNGNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8pG22EzzCD4xtFHYcEDjfpLlH9xj_Ardyi0Ace-I2iM=&emci=125c5c4f-7aca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e090c3fb-24cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter: In a moment, we’re going to ask if you’ll chip in to Becca’s campaign before the March 31 deadline. Regular people chipping in what they can is how Becca was elected to Congress. Here is what your contribution means for our campaign: _Each and every contribution_ we receive...
* Gets us closer to opening field offices across Vermont this year
* Allows us to invest in staff, literature, campaign tech, and events to amplify our progressive values and get Becca’s name out there
* Allows us to travel around the state and build organizing infrastructure for candidates up and down the ballot
* Helps us gear up to go against a competitive primary challenger and anti-LGBTQ interest groups

Contributions from grassroots supporters like you are what helped elect Becca — a teacher, lesbian, and mom from a working-class background — to Congress last year, **and your continued support is what will keep her in Washington fighting for all of us. ** [**So if you can swing it, we would appreciate your support to help us hit our critical $32,000 Q1 fundraising goal with a contribution of $5 or more today. clean_body: Here is what your contribution means for our campaign: | | Peter: In a moment, we’re going to ask if you’ll chip in to Becca’s campaign before the March 31 deadline. Regular people chipping in what they can is how Becca was elected to Congress. Here is what your contribution means for our campaign: Each and every contribution we receive... Gets us closer to opening field offices across Vermont this year Allows us to invest in staff, literature, campaign tech, and events to amplify our progressive values and get Becca’s name out there Allows us to travel around the state and build organizing infrastructure for candidates up and down the ballot Helps us gear up to go against a competitive primary challenger and anti-LGBTQ interest groups Contributions from grassroots supporters like you are what helped elect Becca — a teacher, lesbian, and mom from a working-class background — to Congress last year, and your continued support is what will keep her in Washington fighting for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you - let's do this! name: Jeff Bermant
subject: Introducing: The Only Conservative Web Browser
body:
It’s time to ditch Google and get REAL results, censorship-free
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kFFvgyAUhX-NvtUo4EUfeOjatEuXbA9LlmwvBgVaNlCLONN_PzDtEnITvnvuzTlXsgJoTSGnpEoF48CVFKlmKEc4x6gsICdlkeGSCqxAcowJKCAJyaXl2mS8WLhzw2CzbrDphVWVaAlpVaEQoiC7rqBVTVQtIFcYKE4Nu3g_TgneJugQ3iLV3Avp4nz4-nn6iQ18mL1tOm5Hrs99gve-bcTQN4NtpG0WF-vDY4Igiqdhdp0M0rhoJVYKPdtA5IN0Q-9l7wO62w686Y0WgZTPsPv6qP3pvMKLFsHl_tie3uHNodQxMS7aGD0BDfHPa_wYOng0Wt1YQp8ShNYxhNZ86Pq5WDd_25fjxvxWmyu82jI20S5Ufxvlv_K-JFuvGind_wHaAH95)

| Friend,
I wanted to introduce you to **[Tusk](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kM1ugzAQhJ8GbkH-wyYHDm2jRGql9pBTT8jgJbixMTGmKG9fGyWVrJX87exqZqHGXOwFR4JVuaollz2oXNcEEYooKTFHrMQFLYWiPQdJKeM9ZxlDYKU2hcSr9N45W3TO5kPdAkKAW4RbwALvS9ZhtGfAeFdVklGam3oIYZoz-pKRY3wr9MuowKf5-A3LfE0NelyCbTppJ6kvY0YPoW2UGxtnG7DN6lN9eswIT-LZLb6DKE2LNmJB6cVGAk_SuTHAGCJ62I68GY1WkZzLdbhebrCcNzhoFV0eTu37mX95kvtaTas2Rs9cxPiXLX4KHT0a3d_rTLxmhGxjhGz5yO17tX75sR-nnfmtdjf-acvUJG-xhvsE_8rHkmK7aqLi8Afh0n_0)** , my new one-of-a-kind web browser designed to promote censorship-free content that will restore free speech online.
**Our First Amendment is under attack** from all angles, but perhaps most prevalently online where Big Tech companies like Google censor and silence opposing views and sources.
These browsers have created algorithms that completely hide stories and articles with opposing views...and almost always those from Conservative authors and sources.
**_Just think about what would have happened if news outlets and Big Tech search engines hadn’t censored the Hunter Biden laptop story?_**
That’s why my team and I created **[Tusk, the internet’s ONLY web browser that truly values freedom of speech](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kFFrwyAUhX-NeWtIrommDz5sKy2ssD2UwfYUjJrWTZPU6EL__TS0A7ngd-89nHMVKwndUlLQqskk44T3SmaaQQG4wFCXpKjqMsc1lbgnimNckZ5UqCqU5drkvFy4c-NoczHa7MK6BlNBoWhU3QgJW6hUXUVV0UO37bs6M-zi_TQj_IRgH9-i-jBI5dJ-_Pow_6QG3gdvW8HtxPV5QHjnu1aOQzvaVtl2cak-PCIgaXgegxMqjiahlVgldbCRqAcR4-DV4CO62468HYyWkZyOwX_e_Ae9rvCiZXS5O3SvJ_LuIHNMTos2Rs-ExvjnNX4KHT0a3d8Yos8IYF0DWPPB9WuxLnzb42FjfpvNlbzZOjXhJVZ_m9T_5F0kX6-aKN39AaJ8gJE)** which allows users to choose how they freely and securely search the web.
And now, you can be a leader in our fight to promote free speech online and throughout the world by helping us grow and becoming a true investor in Tusk. | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kMtugzAQRb8GdkHgxxgWLNpGidSqD6mbdIUcPCRubSDGFOXva6OkkjWSz9wZ3TtYFyAqAblgZapqCbJDleqa5ITmlPACcsaLjHKhaAcoKWXQAUtYjlZqk8likc4Ng83awabnmiMqwQpeHSGnFQHCJKhCSVFiVSLnqanP3o9TQh8SsgtvwW7uFbo4H75-nn5ig-5mb5tW2lHqU5_QrT82auibwTZom8XFeveYEIjiaZhdi0EaF63EotKzDQTvpB16j70P6GY78KY3WgXiKgWHj1d3kCs8axVcbvfH5094dyR1tRoXbYyeQIT4pzV-DB08Gt1d60Q8JoSsY4Ss-cjla7Fu_rYv-435LTcXeLM8NslTqP464r_ytiRbrxqp2P4Byzx_pg)

| | | | | [JOIN TUSK](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kEFrhDAQhX-N3lY0o4k9eNiu7EIL20Oh0JNEM65pE-PGWNn--iayWwgD-ebN8N5glVH2xGjK8jIWFae8RxHLiqQEUiBFRtO8yBIomICeIgfIaU_zKE9Rc6kSnq3cWmN00hkdDxVDL-o5tNAiEXkvCHQFpG3BAErALlbV4Nw0R7CPyNG_FftlFGjDvP-6Zf4ODTguTjcd1xOXlzGC2rWNMGNjdIO6WW2oD48RoUE8m8V26KVh0UY0CrloT_BBOjM6HJ1Hd9ueN6OSwpPycG5_PwaoxQYHKbzL-tS-vNM3S2JbiWmVSsmZMh__ssUPob1HJftbFbHniJBtjJAtH7l-rtouX_r1tFM_5e5Kz7oITXLw1d0m_FfelyTbVQNl9R_Dj4BU)

If you want to help take down Big Tech Oligarchs and take back our First Amendment rights on the web, **[don’t miss this opportunity to become an investor in our movement.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kFFrwyAUhX-NeWtIrkbTBx-2lRZa2B4Gg-0lmGhaN42pMcv676ehG8gFv3vu5ZyreEnZltGCkTqTXFDRK5lpDgXgAkNV0oJUZY4rJnFPlcCY0J4SRAplhTa5KBfhvXM275zNLpzJWpKWyna7VX2pAFdtLcpOECFAshpnhl9CGCeEHxDs41tUPw9S-TQfv2GevlID7-dgm07YUejzgPAutI10Q-Nso2yz-FT_PCKgSTy52XcqStOilVgl9WwjUX-kc0NQQ4jobjvyZjBaRnKobu3x7fBx-lnhRcsp0fb4Sl88ZJ7LcdHG6ImyGP-8xk-ho0ej-xtH7BEBrGMAaz64vi_Wz5_2dNiY73pzpc-2Sk14ijXcRvWvvC_J16smyna_3COAfA)**

You’ll be getting in on the ground floor and as we grow with our team of top notch developers and advisors.

**[Take a few minutes to learn more about Tusk](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9kE-LwyAQxT-NuTWYMdH0kEP_0MIu7B4WFnoKRk1rN8bUmA359quhXZABf_NmeG9UlVG2ZRSzvExkxSlvlUx0BRgIJlBkFOdFlpKCSdJSxQnJaUtzlGNluO5Sns3cOWtNKqxJbhVptxQLIcusKBhrKCOtAlViLAAEa7ZJV928H0ZEdghO4c2qnXqpXJwPXz-NP7FBTpM3teBm4PraI3L0TS1tX1tTK1PPLtaXRwQ0ikc7OaGCNC5aiVFSTyYQ9SLC9l71PqCn7cDrvtMykDPfX-50OSzfK7xpOUbavH3RTweJq-Qw667TI2Uh_nWNH0MHj51ulwqxPQJYxwDWfPC4zMZNd_N-3nS_5eZBP0wRm3AI1S-D-lc-l6TrVSNlxz__mn_W)** , our vision, and the unique opportunity to join us as we fight to liberate the internet and provide a safe and truly free search engine for everyone to use.

Yours in Freedom,

Jeff Bermant
CEO, Tusk

[View this email in your browser](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw9jk1PwzAMhn9NcluVOF_dIYfBtEkggdAOiGPWJGtQQru0XTV-PVkZSLZl2X4fv05TqdZKEsVrbLWRxjuLgwYCjDAQVBIuaMWEssxLZxjj0kuOOHHJhFgZOpucuy5VTZdwq5vaekKtPYJdC06t4s5bxqBmzkAtCI66Hcd-QGyDYFdizl31NTXRTcMvsXDK2KQ-Bn8t3aXkaXDf0hze3RtiuzbYIt_uj08H-ZoBZ237OcQYBqmKr9MfBd8ZGqkHBLDIAJbHcP6YU54-0_N-FS_16ixfkrgt4bHU8dq7_8s7pFrM3aZq-wMQZV0W)

name: Democrats.org
subject: The best way to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot is by renewing your membership to the DNC before our last shipment goes to the printer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Thanks to the leadership of President Biden, more Americans across the country will no longer be forced to pay astronomical prices for the life-saving insulin they need. | |
---
Thanks to the leadership of President Biden, more Americans across the country will no longer be forced to pay astronomical prices for the life-saving insulin they need. This month, all three of the largest insulin producers heeded President Biden’s call to lower costs and dramatically reduced their insulin prices. These announcements are building on the progress Democrats made by passing the _Inflation Reduction Act_ and capping insulin costs for seniors on Medicare -- and it’s all thanks to this team. This team has stepped up in key moments to elect Democrats nationwide who are committed to lowering health care costs for all Americans, and we couldn’t be more proud to have you on the team. **But we need to keep building on this progress. The best way to do that right now is to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot by renewing your membership to the DNC before our March deadline.**

clean_body: Thanks to the leadership of President Biden, more Americans across the country will no longer be forced to pay astronomical prices for the life-saving insulin they need. | | Thanks to the leadership of President Biden, more Americans across the country will no longer be forced to pay astronomical prices for the life-saving insulin they need. This month, all three of the largest insulin producers heeded President Biden’s call to lower costs and dramatically reduced their insulin prices. These announcements are building on the progress Democrats made by passing the Inflation Reduction Act and capping insulin costs for seniors on Medicare -- and it’s all thanks to this team. This team has stepped up in key moments to elect Democrats nationwide who are committed to lowering health care costs for all Americans, and we couldn’t be more proud to have you on the team. But we need to keep building on this progress. The best way to do that right now is to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot by renewing your membership to the DNC before our March deadline. This news shows the power of this grassroots team, Derek -- especially in the face of the Republican Party’s efforts to jeopardize bedrock programs like Social Security and Medicare. We’re thankful to have you on this team, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . subject: WE MUST make ourselves heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479324:J98weZG4N:m:1:3331421248:F540F412FD4085348E6A2A683F0B7B01:r "Those are the people who have never run a statewide campaign in Texas – population 30 million. ")
Peter,

.
Democrats are coming at me with everything they've got.
.
**In 2018, I was outspent and outraised 3-1.**
.
In 2024, I believe my Senate race will cost $100 million.

.
I guarantee you there are a dozen Democrat gazillionaires who are looking back at 2018 and saying: _' we came two points away from beating that S-O-B. And next time I'm writing another million-dollar check.'_
.
**Here 's my prediction:** This race is going to be a firefight but we're going to win not only here in Texas but in states like Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia.
.
I am going to be counting on Senate Republicans to help my colleagues and me win next November so we can FLIP the Senate and finally restore some sanity to Washington.
.
We need to raise $1,000 from this email by the end of the day to make sure Senate Republican races like mine have everything we need to fight back against the Democrat gazillionaires.
.
**_[Would you do me the honor of chipping in a small amount of that total right now to help us](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479324:J98weZG4N:m:1:3331421248:F540F412FD4085348E6A2A683F0B7B01:r)_**** _[ensure we don 't wind up short? ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479324:J98weZG4N:m:1:3331421248:F540F412FD4085348E6A2A683F0B7B01:r)_**
.
** **
For Freedom,

subject: No Planet B.

| U.N. Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change Report: **World likely to surpass 1.5 degrees Celsius warming by early 2030s**
---
Peter: We are running out of time. U.N. scientists just warned that we’re on a path to blow through the 1.5 C° threshold in the next decade.
When we pass 1.5 C° of warming above pre-industrial levels, the planet will experience climate disasters so extreme that humanity can’t adapt. Famine, drought, heat waves, and other disasters will claim untold lives.
Roy and Democrats know that climate change is an existential risk to this planet. **That’s why Roy has repeatedly taken bold action to commit North Carolina to a clean energy future.**
But too many extremists would rather sweep the issue under the rug. They continue to pretend that climate change isn’t a real problem (or even worse, that it’s a hoax). There are some in power who would rather stay on the good side of Big Oil than protect our planet’s future.
**[Before Monday morning: Roy needs you to join him in the existential fight against climate change. Sign on to DEMAND bipartisan action to protect our Earth — because there’s no Planet B>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60715317/398017697/1881706843?refcode=ea.0ab800fd-2bcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0ab800fd-2bcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI4MDBmZC0yYmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s-SwgfoMB7X1fd0S4Sz-FNqGNKjP_Uqpt8yLFcPfw5M=&emci=ce997e02-5bca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0ab800fd-2bcb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call: US Rep. Jamie Raskin, Greenpeace USA, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: Jamie Raskin on Defending the Right to Protest | Greenpeace USA on
Fighting SLAPP Lawsuits | Partnership for Civil Justice Fund | ‘Birdie
Sanders’ Anniversary Sticker | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1011&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1012&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call that kicks off at
8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday!

US Rep. Jamie Raskin will discuss urgent efforts to defend the right to
protest from attacks by an extremist rightwing at odds with free speech
and democracy.

We’ll hear from Greenpeace USA’s Deepa Padmanabha on the corporate tactic
of using SLAPP lawsuits to drain resources from organizations protecting
the environment, public health, and more.

Then, Mara Verheyden-Hilliard, executive director for Partnership for
Civil Justice Fund, will talk about how we can defend the right to
dissent.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1013&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1014&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

As Robert Reich explains in this video, corporations are using SLAPP
lawsuits — “Strategic Lawsuit Against Public Participation” — to
intimidate and silence organizations by burdening them with the costs of a
legal defense.

And, winning the case isn’t even necessarily the goal. These lawsuits are
becoming widespread as a way for corporations to drain groups of time and
resources to have a chilling effect on all kinds of public-interest work
from health care to workers rights to democracy.

For example, Energy Transfer Partners is filing suits over Standing Rock
and the Dakota Access Pipeline, accusing environmental organizations of
criminal conspiracy, ecoterrorism, and even drug trafficking!

Some of these lawsuits have been filed by Michael Bowe (a member of
Trump’s personal legal team!) and he’s openly talking with other
corporations to file more SLAPP suits.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1015&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]We need to fight back now and show corporations they cannot SLAPP us
into silence. Sign up to join our call on Monday to learn more.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1016&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders,
activists, and fellow workers. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1017&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]RSVP to participate in the Zoom directly
and make connections in the chat!

Thousands more tune-in LIVE on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8355?t=1018&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8356?t=1019&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]Twitter, and you can
find more of our video content by subscribing to our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8357?t=1020&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]YouTube channel.

Help us build Monday’s call by sharing out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1021&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]link on Twitter or
sending this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1022&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]invite to your friends to join the interactive broadcast
with you!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1023&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

NEW ‘BIRDIE SANDERS’ STICKER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8489?t=1024&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

This month marks the 7th anniversary of the famous bird-landing on
Bernie's podium — and we're celebrating with a new sticker depicting the
hope and joy that was lit in that moment.

Get your sticker with a one-time donation of $10 (just $5 for members!) or
sign-up for a monthly donation of just $5 or more.

This heartwarming moment in Bernie-history took place in 2016 in Portland,
OR, where a crowd of 28,000 erupted in thunderous applause. “I think
there's some symbolism here,” Bernie said. “This bird is really a dove
asking us for world peace — no more wars!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8489?t=1025&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]GET YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1026&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

Don’t forget to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1027&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]RSVP NOW for our interactive broadcast, which starts
at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday! US Rep. Jamie Raskin and Greenpeace
USA’s Deepa Padmanabha will discuss urgent efforts to defend the right to
protest and fight back against corporate lawsuits.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1028&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ]JOIN THE CALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1029&akid=4144%2E5885482%2EEvvhlm ][IMG]

WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call TOPICS: Jamie Raskin on Defending the Right to Protest | Greenpeace USA on Fighting SLAPP Lawsuits | Partnership for Civil Justice Fund | ‘Birdie Sanders’ Anniversary Sticker | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our [ ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call that kicks off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday! US Rep. Jamie Raskin will discuss urgent efforts to defend the right to protest from attacks by an extremist rightwing at odds with free speech and democracy. We’ll hear from Greenpeace USA’s Deepa Padmanabha on the corporate tactic of using SLAPP lawsuits to drain resources from organizations protecting the environment, public health, and more. Then, Mara Verheyden-Hilliard, executive director for Partnership for Civil Justice Fund, will talk about how we can defend the right to dissent. [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As Robert Reich explains in this video, corporations are using SLAPP lawsuits — “Strategic Lawsuit Against Public Participation” — to intimidate and silence organizations by burdening them with the costs of a legal defense. And, winning the case isn’t even necessarily the goal. These lawsuits are becoming widespread as a way for corporations to drain groups of time and resources to have a chilling effect on all kinds of public-interest work from health care to workers rights to democracy. For example, Energy Transfer Partners is filing suits over Standing Rock and the Dakota Access Pipeline, accusing environmental organizations of criminal conspiracy, ecoterrorism, and even drug trafficking! Some of these lawsuits have been filed by Michael Bowe (a member of Trump’s personal legal team!) and he’s openly talking with other corporations to file more SLAPP suits. [ ]We need to fight back now and show corporations they cannot SLAPP us into silence. Sign up to join our call on Monday to learn more. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders, activists, and fellow workers. [ ]RSVP to participate in the Zoom directly and make connections in the chat! Thousands more tune-in LIVE on our [ ]Facebook and [ ]Twitter, and you can find more of our video content by subscribing to our [ ]YouTube channel. Help us build Monday’s call by sharing out this [ ]link on Twitter or sending this [ ]invite to your friends to join the interactive broadcast with you! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ NEW ‘BIRDIE SANDERS’ STICKER [ ][IMG] This month marks the 7th anniversary of the famous bird-landing on Bernie's podium — and we're celebrating with a new sticker depicting the hope and joy that was lit in that moment. Get your sticker with a one-time donation of $10 (just $5 for members!) or sign-up for a monthly donation of just $5 or more. This heartwarming moment in Bernie-history took place in 2016 in Portland, OR, where a crowd of 28,000 erupted in thunderous applause. “I think there's some symbolism here,” Bernie said. “This bird is really a dove asking us for world peace — no more wars!” [ ]GET YOUR STICKER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t forget to [ ]RSVP NOW for our interactive broadcast, which starts at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday! US Rep. Jamie Raskin and Greenpeace USA’s Deepa Padmanabha will discuss urgent efforts to defend the right to protest and fight back against corporate lawsuits. [ ]JOIN THE CALL ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! But in order to sweep must-win races and retake the House, we’ll need to replenish our bank accounts — and fast. With just HOURS to go until the biggest deadline of the month, we can’t afford to miss critical benchmarks like this one. But right now, I’m still 918 gifts short. So I’m asking if you will help by chipping in $15 in these final 24 hours. I can't tell you how much I’m relying on supporters like you to replenish our resources, crush our goal, and position us to WIN the House in 2024. Will you step up? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60715434/398018065/1694452237?refcode=20230325_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhmNmE0YS0yYWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OabN4TALfI1Wk3_anB3niBoJ6nL8HtNVqFIdj7J5VuU=) | [**2023 TEAM PELOSI MEMBER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60715435/398018066/1694452237?refcode=20230325_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhmNmE0YS0yYWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OabN4TALfI1Wk3_anB3niBoJ6nL8HtNVqFIdj7J5VuU=)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Can I take a moment of your time?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It's no surprise that a majority of Kentuckians approve of the job Andy's doing as governor. Peter,

I'm proud of what my administration has accomplished in just three years. We've restored voting rights to 180,000 Kentuckians, expanded healthcare access, created tens of thousands of jobs, and achieved the lowest unemployment rate in the history of the Commonwealth.

Kentucky is on the right path, but if we're going to protect and grow our progress, we must win this race in November. It won't be easy. We won by just over**_5,000_ votes** last election, and this year is shaping up to be just as close.

The truth is, with outside money already pouring into Kentucky and 12 Republican opponents vying for their nomination, we need to ensure we're in the best position to hold off a well-funded challenger – and that starts with ending the first quarter of this election year off strong. Our very first quarterly filing deadline is around the corner and I'm hoping this team will help send a message to my opponents that Kentuckians are ready to continue moving our Commonwealth forward.

[**Can I count on your support today? Please donate before the quarterly filing deadline at midnight on the 31st to help ensure we have the resources to protect Kentucky's progress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60715756/398020276/-163275292?refcode=em23_230325_filng1_fndd_gq_act_q1_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230325_filng1_fndd_gq_act_q1_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=15d2667b-2ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQyNjY3Yi0yZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfmXLnACWGNoOZ6TSajEPwykndaR9UDy0kXR6FyyTbA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60715758/398020278/-163275292?refcode=em23_230325_filng1_fndd_gq_act_q1_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230325_filng1_fndd_gq_act_q1_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=15d2667b-2ecb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQyNjY3Yi0yZWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfmXLnACWGNoOZ6TSajEPwykndaR9UDy0kXR6FyyTbA=)

clean_body: It's no surprise that a majority of Kentuckians approve of the job Andy's doing as governor. Peter, I'm proud of what my administration has accomplished in just three years. We've restored voting rights to 180,000 Kentuckians, expanded healthcare access, created tens of thousands of jobs, and achieved the lowest unemployment rate in the history of the Commonwealth. Kentucky is on the right path, but if we're going to protect and grow our progress, we must win this race in November. It won't be easy. We won by just over5,000 votes last election, and this year is shaping up to be just as close. The truth is, with outside money already pouring into Kentucky and 12 Republican opponents vying for their nomination, we need to ensure we're in the best position to hold off a well-funded challenger – and that starts with ending the first quarter of this election year off strong. Our very first quarterly filing deadline is around the corner and I'm hoping this team will help send a message to my opponents that Kentuckians are ready to continue moving our Commonwealth forward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = The end-of-quarter financial reporting deadline matters — every campaign's fundraising numbers will be made available to the public, and my opponents will be looking at ours for any sign of weakness. body:

Peter – Here are three things you need to know about this race for Washington's 8th District:

1️⃣ **Election experts are predicting another tough race.** _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ is saying Washington's 8th District only "Leans Democratic" in 2024.

2️⃣ **Kim is a top target for National Republicans.** The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) released its list of pick-up opportunities in 2024 and named Kim a top target.

3️⃣ **Kim already has an opponent.** A Republican challenger has already announced her campaign to unseat Kim in 2024.

Election Day might feel far off, but this race is already heating up. It's only a matter of time before more opponents jump into the race and the attacks against Kim begin. That's why we need your help to reach our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to take on anything that comes our way.

**[Rush a donation before our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year.
