clean_body: Here are three things you need to know about this race for Washington's 8th District: Peter – Here are three things you need to know about this race for Washington's 8th District: 1️⃣ Election experts are predicting another tough race. Sabato's Crystal Ball is saying Washington's 8th District only "Leans Democratic" in 2024. 2️⃣ Kim is a top target for National Republicans. The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) released its list of pick-up opportunities in 2024 and named Kim a top target. 3️⃣ Kim already has an opponent. A Republican challenger has already announced her campaign to unseat Kim in 2024. Election Day might feel far off, but this race is already heating up. It's only a matter of time before more opponents jump into the race and the attacks against Kim begin. That's why we need your help to reach our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to take on anything that comes our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. name: Brendan McPhillips, Team Helen
subject: March 27th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
Hey there — It’s Brendan.

I want to take a moment to explain something. You probably get a lot of emails every day from other candidates and groups with subject lines that beg you to read them or sound off alarm bells about the impending end of democracy. We get them, too.

Plenty of these emails use notorious scam tactics, like promising that mysterious donors will “match” your donations. That kind of stuff is garbage and has no place in a campaign that truly values its supporters.

Instead, our focus is on inspiring a grassroots coalition around Helen’s bold vision for safer neighborhoods, stronger schools, and thriving communities. Here’s the truth: our upcoming fundraising deadline on Monday is our biggest and most important one yet.

Online contributions are one of the most important ways we power Helen’s work. With out-of-touch millionaire opponents spending boatloads of money to prop up their campaigns, this upcoming deadline is extremely critical if we want to elect a proven fighter like Helen as our next Mayor. All of the naysayers will be looking at our fundraising report to see if we have the resources to stack up.

So — I have to ask, will you pitch in right now and help us reach our $10,000 online contribution goal before our fundraising deadline on Monday? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=10]
CHIP IN $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=15]

CHIP IN $20.23 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=20.23]
CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=50]

CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=100]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]

When the reports become public, we’re hoping to have the strongest grassroots support in this race. If you’re able to pitch in anything, Helen and our entire team would be especially grateful.

Thank you for your support,

Brendan McPhillips
Campaign Manager, Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: My Mother Dorothy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478980:6pHXqZGlN:m:1:3365131770:F3A1262B0BEBDAB8839DAD020A43DF68:r)
---

The values I live by, and the pull I feel toward service, were greatly influenced by my mother, Dorothy Mercer Pompeo.

She was one of ten children born to the most hardworking and community-minded people that I know.

She raised me and my siblings the same way she was raised: **with hard work, commitment to parenthood, and strong family values.**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478980:6pHXqZGlN:m:1:3365131770:F3A1262B0BEBDAB8839DAD020A43DF68:r)
---

Whether it was planning our next trip to see family in Kansas, packing us in the car to a political event, making sure we read books throughout our summer vacation, or attending one of our school programs, _she was a huge influence on why I hold dear all that I do._

**Now, the American values and the way of life I grew up living are disappearing.** The radical Left is taking our country in the completely wrong direction, stripping away our religious roots, our patriotic past, and our never give an inch attitude.

We must fight back to save America as we know it. _**Are you with me?**_

---
| | [SAVE AMERICA](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478980:6pHXqZGlN:m:1:3365131770:F3A1262B0BEBDAB8839DAD020A43DF68:r)
---

_We can 't back down or give in. We have to stay in the fight and stand up for what is right._

We MUST kick Democrats out of power and elect America's first conservatives to save our nation. _**[Please consider chipping in whatever you can today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478980:6pHXqZGlN:m:1:3365131770:F3A1262B0BEBDAB8839DAD020A43DF68:r "Please consider
chipping in whatever you can today.")**_

We cannot give up on America!

Fighting For Our Future,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478980:6pHXqZGlN:m:1:3365131770:F3A1262B0BEBDAB8839DAD020A43DF68:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Championing Our American Values")

Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker.

## DON'T MISS March 27th, 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
March 27th we will be choosing delegates for the Annual CRA Convention and also we will be reviewing the upcoming bylaws that will be on the ballot at the convention. If you want to have a voice then you need to show up.
Door opens at 6:30 we get started shortly after.
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: It all adds up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19985%2E3422442%2EZu7qJA)
Derek,
As a campaign powered by small dollar donors, support from folks like you is the reason we’re able to get ads up, hire organizers, and plan events so that Katie can reach voters across the great state of California.
But our first FEC fundraising deadline of this campaign is coming up on March 31, and we need to have a strong showing if we’re going to demonstrate the true power of our campaign.
**That’s why we’re reaching out to see if you can make your very first donation of $5 today.**
[**Click here to make your first donation of $5 to send Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230325-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAF25_2_NON_20230325_V1_F&refcode2=19985_3422442_Zu7qJA&akid=19985%2E3422442%2EZu7qJA)
[**Click here to contribute a different amount—anything you can afford to donate will make a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230325-2?refcode=EMAF25_2_NON_20230325_V1_F&refcode2=19985_3422442_Zu7qJA&akid=19985%2E3422442%2EZu7qJA)
Throughout her career, Katie has advocated for consumers at every level—from holding Big Banks accountable for paying Californians billions following the 2008 mortgage crisis, to introducing a bill to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.

subject: the beatings will continue until morale improves
body:
|
---
| | What a week it's been...

With the legislative session nearing its end date, tensions are running high and days are getting longer.

As always, I make it a point to speak up when necessary and push back against statist ideas and the rapid expansion of government.

It's not just about supporting good legislation - it's just as important to stop bad legislation, and we managed to do both this week.

**We cannot afford to let Idaho become the next California** , which is why we need to keep fighting for what we believe in.

I've put together some highlights from the week that I think you'll enjoy watching (I also posted them on [Twitter](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=1298108452&e=dea908e0fe "see Lenney's Twitter feed") and [Facebook](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=a54c4416b4&e=dea908e0fe "see his Facebook") if you want to view/share them on either of those platforms):

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=874ec349f9&e=dea908e0fe)

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=04886bcdb8&e=dea908e0fe)

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=24ba050f2a&e=dea908e0fe)

Cheers,

Brian

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Are progressives demanding too much?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60717581/398026179/1010378950?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUzYTM0ZWItMzRjYi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvgPKiiR2hBU2k1sLfJXN39agDj9fsDsZmN-FK87mPs=) Friend,

If I've learned anything in my career in public service, it's that enacting change is never easy, but that shouldn't mean we have to waver on our values or water down our progressive positions.

When I was first elected to the Glendale City Council, I knew going in that the council was conservative-leaning. Rather than assume progress was hopeless, we got organized and passed an ordinance banning the Glendale Gun Show from being held on public property.

In the Assembly, I championed bold policies to address climate change, protect our reproductive freedoms, and move our state towards single-payer health care -- even when I knew we'd face stiff resistance from corporate and special interests.

**I'm under no illusion about what we’re facing in a GOP-controlled House, but that won't change what we're trying to accomplish.**

This campaign is about creating _meaningful_ reform in this country. It's about building a society with clean air to breathe and clean water to drink. It's about freeing our communities from the terror of gun violence. And it's about making sure no one is just a bad hospital visit away from financial ruin.

I refuse to buy into the narrative that progressives are demanding too much. We've proven that change is possible, but only if we all come together to make it happen.

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Let me tell you a story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
|
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62481475:Jeut5ZGNJ:m:1:3361486117:4E6E11F9ED6FEEECA864E01687CD40BA:r)
---
I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance.

I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant.

One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home!

It became harder and harder to keep in touch. There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly.

Until one day shortly before Christmas.

A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions.

So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from.

This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile.

I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. **My new book,_Superpower in Peril_ , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness.**

America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America.
_**[If you'd like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62481475:Jeut5ZGNJ:m:1:3361486117:4E6E11F9ED6FEEECA864E01687CD40BA:r "If you’d
like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:")**_

---
**This is the book that Fox News Anchor Mark Levin, UN Ambassador Nikki Haley, and 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo are all raving about, and you can get your copy signed.**

I hope I'll be signing your book soon! Thank you for being dedicated to restoring America to power.

Sincerely,
Dave McCormick

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: Six Days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We want to give you an honest update.
#
Peter, this grassroots team means everything to Cori. So, with our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming fast, we want to give you an honest update.
Since the start of the year, our fundraising has _slowed considerably._ If we're able to effectively fundraise now, our movement will be in a stronger place in the future. **That's why today we're officially launching a goal to raise $75,000 in online donations by midnight on Friday, March 31.**
Unlike many other elected officials, Cori focuses on fighting for this community, and that means turning down the big money that would otherwise come in from corporate PAC donations.
**[With just six days until our deadline, can you chip in $5 to help meet our goal in time to make sure Cori has the funds to continue organizing and legislating for bold, anti-racist, progressive change in Congress?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230325.HJKYng&refcode=em20230325-2395&t=1&akid=2395%2E1082990%2EcND2T7)**
This won't be easy, Peter. We're going to have to hustle for the next six days to make sure we can hit this $75,000 end-of-quarter goal. **_But if we come together right now,_ our grassroots movement will be in a stronger position to keep fighting for the bold, progressive agenda that will deliver for everyday people and communities.**
**[Please, will you donate $5 or anything you can to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal? Every dollar you give powers Cori's work in Congress to lift up regular, everyday people, protect Black lives and livelihoods, and transforms politics.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230325.HJKYng&refcode=em20230325-2395&t=2&akid=2395%2E1082990%2EcND2T7)**
**[Donate Now →](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230325.HJKYng&amount=5&refcode=em20230325-2395&t=21&akid=2395%2E1082990%2EcND2T7) **
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230325?refcode=em20230325-2395-footer&t=22&refcode2=2395_1082990_cND2T7&akid=2395%2E1082990%2EcND2T7) **

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: our big deadline this Thursday, March 31 at 11:59 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
In less than one week, we’ll be reporting all of our fundraising numbers from the past three months to the Federal Election Commission.
This will be the first time our numbers will go public since John was sworn in to the Senate — and it’s crucial we have a major show of strength. That’s where we need you now more than ever:
**[We’re asking for your first-ever 2023 donation to John Fetterman before the FEC deadline this Thursday at 11:59 p.m. ET. Will you consider pitching in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230325-1?refcode=em20230325-1-8303&refcode2=8303_434096_Madwwf&akid=8303%2E434096%2EMadwwf)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230325-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230325-8303&refcode2=8303_434096_Madwwf&akid=8303%2E434096%2EMadwwf)**
It's not lost on us that you get a lot of requests from our team.
We know they can sometimes start to pile up.
But the reality is that, if we want to continue putting our grassroots strength behind John’s work in the Senate, then we MUST raise at least another $50,000 before our Q3 FEC deadline happening this Thursday, March 31.
Here's what we know (and what we hope you know too, Derek): We absolutely have the team out there to make it happen — and it’s made up of working people from Cresco and all across Pennsylvania.
**The only way we can fuel our work is with lots of online donations — big or small — from people like you.** **[So we've gotta ask: Will you donate your first $5 of 2023 ahead of this Thursday's FEC deadline? It'd really make all the difference in this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230325-1?refcode=em20230325-1-8303&refcode2=8303_434096_Madwwf&akid=8303%2E434096%2EMadwwf)**
Thank you for everything. We’ll reach back out soon.
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230325-8303-footer&t=1&refcode2=8303_434096_Madwwf&akid=8303%2E434096%2EMadwwf)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

body:
Soros and the Deep State will not roll over quietly.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMFuwyAQRL8G32zBYoM5-JDU7SVqVeXQtKcIwyYhMtiycaP-fXGUVkIc3swOzGLDhFRSyJqqzDZgajAmcw1Q4JRDxWpas6rgQlmjNFcSDaWCkZLeXCjsEHRvr3Fa_FiYwWeXxpxqRkvVdQaZMbZiSnecWtAMGVqlsr65xDjOhG8IvKQzo1kmLFLchHYNWZn-xlx7nJzR-XVwIeanJdhJu9mFc55M3sWImKzB9CCZqlQtrQXBWScIf1miP3q0bvGEt-i16wmIFc7DMhlM0LijfjCj_ajdOST6V_tPGULEEJNQl7VM8Bh6Z9fpffc6n5f36vkOL86mQu3mYzpcNl_iNZsaO95c37tZyLSr8_qD-4LSU707_TREbgnAfQ7gvgvYldvPN7E77Np8_w5V3oqqvK0qPKU7_oz4b32kFI9mQGT7C1ZJjQc)

Friend,
The baseless Deep State witch hunt we are watching unfold out of New York is but the tip of the iceberg in Soros’ plot to destroy our movement.
You may think they couldn’t go any lower – intimidating my family, associates, and voters like YOU, spying on my campaign, reportedly withholding evidence from a grand jury, RAIDING my home in a made-for-TV moment, concocting witch hunts out of thin air...
_...And now, threatening a possible**ARREST and ARRAIGNMENT**. _
But I assure you, it can get worse. Soros and the Deep State will not roll over quietly.
This is a man who spent over**$128 MILLION** to ensure Biden and the radical Democrats maintained control of the Senate last year.
And he spent $1 million to get his witch-hunt-crazed Manhattan D.A. elected. Believe me, he’s not going to leave another $127 million on the table in 2024.

You may think they couldn’t go any lower – intimidating my family, associates, and voters like YOU, spying on my campaign, reportedly withholding evidence from a grand jury, RAIDING my home in a made-for-TV moment, concocting witch hunts out of thin air... ...And now, threatening a possibleARREST and ARRAIGNMENT. But I assure you, it can get worse. Soros and the Deep State will not roll over quietly. This is a man who spent over$128 MILLION to ensure Biden and the radical Democrats maintained control of the Senate last year. And he spent $1 million to get his witch-hunt-crazed Manhattan D.A. elected. Believe me, he’s not going to leave another $127 million on the table in 2024. The raging left-wing mob will spend every last dollar at their disposal and fabricate every last lie they can conjure up to try and stop us from Making America Great Again! But not ifYOU have something to say about it, Friend. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=85%2E35263%2Eh7hAKY ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter!

Our finance team is fired up and closely tracking our fundraising as we
rapidly approach our first FEC deadline of the year. I’ll explain more
about why this deadline is so important, but first I want to ask:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-march2023.nl-AYM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=85%2E35263%2Eh7hAKY ]Can we count on your support towards our campaign today? We want to
share impressive numbers in our FEC report, but to do that, we'll need a
lot more grassroots support in the next few days.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-march2023.nl-AYM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=85%2E35263%2Eh7hAKY ]DONATE

When the clock strikes midnight on March 31st, we close the books on our
fundraising for the first quarter of the year. Then, our team will compile
our fundraising report and send it off to the FEC — shortly after, that
report will be made public for everyone to see.

These reports might look long and boring, but we know that Republican
operatives will be scanning our numbers closely to see the status of our
campaign fundraising.

A weak report will open the door to potential challengers entering the
race for Tammy’s Senate seat. Already, several potential Republican
candidates (like Paul Ryan) are waiting in the wings, and they’ll jump at
any opportunity to enter the race if Tammy’s fundraising operation isn’t
strong enough.

That’s where you come in: By Friday night, we want to raise another
$15,000 from our digital fundraising program.

This is an ambitious goal, but it’s what we need to raise if we want to
post a number that will ward off Republican challengers for the time
being. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-march2023.nl-AYM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=85%2E35263%2Eh7hAKY ]So
Peter, will you contribute $10
or another amount today to get us one step closer to reaching our goal?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-march2023.g7SZxj&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=85%2E35263%2Eh7hAKY ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

name: Team Kunce
subject: The reality:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
The majority of folks who see this email in their inbox won’t donate. We hope you’re different.
#
Peter — here’s the reality:
The majority of folks who see this email in their inbox won’t donate. Maybe they’ll scroll through for a few seconds, but more likely than not this email will get deleted and they’ll never think about it again.
**We hope you’re different.**
Every dollar supporters like you donate in the early months of this race will help us build the foundation for a winning grassroots campaign — to hire staff, to print some lit, and to start getting Lucas’ message in front of voters.
**That means your support right now could have a real impact on the outcome of this election in 2024.** But if not enough people chip in, we’re at risk of being crushed by the GOP mega-donors and corporate elites lining up to support Josh Hawley — and we can’t afford to let that happen.
**[So if you’re ready to help us prepare our movement for the fight ahead, please click here to add your very first donation of $10 or anything at all to our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29856?refcode=em20230325-2877&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2877%2E614464%2EDkryWm)**

body:
2018 Letter Shatters Michael Cohen’s Claims in Trump Case

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653283%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XH%2fqlKk%2ftlLt1L2OBT3SpA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WkJnQeu92Csc0ZwU%2bVpuaw&sysid=1 Trump Grand Jury Pushed to Next Week: Bragg Struggles with ‘Weak’ Case

The Manhattan grand jury’s decision regarding former President Donald Trump’s hush money case will not be reached this week as previously thought. Fox News has confirmed that the grand jury will not hear any testimony, deliberate, or conduct any votes on the case on Thursday, leading to a postponement of the verdict until next week.

body:
| Peter,

You can look around and see for yourself that GOP leadership is already a disaster for the country. Over these past few months, they have all shown their true colors.

**McCarthy failed FOURTEEN TIMES to become Speaker of the House,** stalling all House business for days and making closed door deals with MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene.

**MAGA hostage McCarthy then made good on those deals by removing me from the House Intelligence Committee** , an act of pure vengeance.

**_And now, the GOP is threatening a debt ceiling showdown that could create utter chaos for our economy._**

Make no mistake, **these people are content to burn it all down if it means they’ll stay in power**. And if just these past few months are any indication of what they’re capable of, bets are off with what they’ll try to pull next. That’s why I’m so committed to holding them accountable, no matter the cost.

[**So here’s what we have to do: We have less than 24 hours left until our $10,000 rapid response goal, and we need all hands on deck. name: Dan Kildee
subject: Insulin costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Team — No one should struggle to pay for a medicine they need to survive. That’s why I am pushing for insulin price caps not just for seniors, but ALL American families.

**_[If you agree with me, will you take action to lower insulin costs? I need another 500 voices before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720108/398034102/1038348551?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230325_SV_1.2_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWY2ZjFiYy00MmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84nfz65vNow6hC_ASEKa1kdD2L9F17e4r52SafAqH1A=&emci=10775fa9-bac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=faf6f1bc-42cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)_**

**_Here’s the original message from my team for context:_**
* * *

Team,

Dan knows we need to lower prescription drug prices. That’s why he passed a new law capping the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare at $35 a month.

This is a great first step, but Dan won’t stop fighting until we lower the price of insulin for ALL Americans. He’s introduced a bill, the _Affordable Insulin Now Act_ , to cap the cost of insulin for everyone, regardless of their age or insurer.

Dan knows how much the high cost of prescription drugs affects working families. A father of a type-1 diabetic, he will continue to fight until every Michigander has access to life-saving drugs at a reasonable cost.

Dan’s efforts have already forced big pharmaceutical companies to lower their insulin prices:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720109/398034103/1038348551?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230325_SV_1.2_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWY2ZjFiYy00MmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84nfz65vNow6hC_ASEKa1kdD2L9F17e4r52SafAqH1A=&emci=10775fa9-bac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=faf6f1bc-42cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)
But our work is not over—many Michigan families, including the neediest who don’t have insurance, are still paying far too much for insulin.

**_[Will you tell Dan if you support his push to cap the price of insulin once and for all? Answer here in the next 48 hours:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720110/398034104/1038348551?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230325_SV_1.2_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWY2ZjFiYy00MmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84nfz65vNow6hC_ASEKa1kdD2L9F17e4r52SafAqH1A=&emci=10775fa9-bac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=faf6f1bc-42cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Answer here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720111/398034105/1038348551?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230325_SV_1.2_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWY2ZjFiYy00MmNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84nfz65vNow6hC_ASEKa1kdD2L9F17e4r52SafAqH1A=&emci=10775fa9-bac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=faf6f1bc-42cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
— Team Kildee

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | Team — No one should struggle to pay for a medicine they need to survive. That’s why I am pushing for insulin price caps not just for seniors, but ALL American families. Here’s the original message from my team for context: Team, Dan knows we need to lower prescription drug prices. That’s why he passed a new law capping the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare at $35 a month. This is a great first step, but Dan won’t stop fighting until we lower the price of insulin for ALL Americans. He’s introduced a bill, the Affordable Insulin Now Act , to cap the cost of insulin for everyone, regardless of their age or insurer. Dan knows how much the high cost of prescription drugs affects working families. A father of a type-1 diabetic, he will continue to fight until every Michigander has access to life-saving drugs at a reasonable cost. Dan’s efforts have already forced big pharmaceutical companies to lower their insulin prices: But our work is not over—many Michigan families, including the neediest who don’t have insurance, are still paying far too much for insulin. — Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

subject: Wyoming’s Ban in abortion pills

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720613/398034954/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUxYTE4YTMtNDVjYi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=d_ecMIRAk-fI4Rfm2rXTqc8iXt0J3Ef8YspHRstcxQs=)

It’s been **274 days** since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. And everyday since, we’ve been fighting an uphill battle to restore our fundamental rights — and speaking out against even more extreme legislation. Arizona, Florida, Ohio, Texas, and South Carolina — are just some of the states that have introduced or passed anti abortion laws that restrict and criminalize women, health care providers, and even pharmacies from accessing abortion care. The latest one? **Wyoming. ** Just days ago, the state’s Republican Governor signed into law a bill that outlaws the prescription of medication abortion pills — **making them the first state to ban all access to medication abortion**. Luckily, a Wyoming judge temporarily blocked the ban — but it’s clear Republicans are going to do everything they can to try and strip our fundamental rights even further. We can’t stress this enough, it’s in our hands to vote out all representatives that decide to take away our right to choose. Here at HER Time, we are doing the job of supporting amazing leaders that will fight **FOR** and not against us. Peter, we promise you this: we’ll support pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot — to ensure we can elect the right leaders to lead our country and protect our lives. [**But we can’t do it alone. We need your help to support our fight ahead. So if you’re with us, will you consider chipping in a donation of any amount today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720614/398034955/-34944291?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUxYTE4YTMtNDVjYi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=d_ecMIRAk-fI4Rfm2rXTqc8iXt0J3Ef8YspHRstcxQs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60720615/398034956/-1711392094?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUxYTE4YTMtNDVjYi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=d_ecMIRAk-fI4Rfm2rXTqc8iXt0J3Ef8YspHRstcxQs=)

clean_body: | = It’s been 274 days since Roe v. Wade was overturned. And everyday since, we’ve been fighting an uphill battle to restore our fundamental rights — and speaking out against even more extreme legislation. Arizona, Florida, Ohio, Texas, and South Carolina — are just some of the states that have introduced or passed anti abortion laws that restrict and criminalize women, health care providers, and even pharmacies from accessing abortion care. The latest one? Wyoming. Just days ago, the state’s Republican Governor signed into law a bill that outlaws the prescription of medication abortion pills — making them the first state to ban all access to medication abortion. Luckily, a Wyoming judge temporarily blocked the ban — but it’s clear Republicans are going to do everything they can to try and strip our fundamental rights even further. We can’t stress this enough, it’s in our hands to vote out all representatives that decide to take away our right to choose. Here at HER Time, we are doing the job of supporting amazing leaders that will fight FOR and not against us. Peter, we promise you this: we’ll support pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot — to ensure we can elect the right leaders to lead our country and protect our lives. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for extending your support. — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

[**If you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in $5 today to win back our House majority, then read on about why this is so important? »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad0YXo5OkenWSPIIJLSAEFT7Mu1Sbz-XnJwrrENYlcQJZVeiuoLRF0llFegZ1SbrcRbpXNK6RG-T3FKWY-ON8iJxgPTI8N89Txuzr5w9jNzcdL7PS6Z9Omm7ph5gu5-bCLi0qA7XEW1GevSMS5rIYeR469qyJpnGWXJ84gbHk8V0qqwoUWQgrv_7V7lA-kEt-YDKuhac7o-iGh8tKefW4Q0NlaP_xyBqQR3PAkhcgl7Pnwxux5dbng2-fc0xODs1UGlCXjux26bkQcRY9dZa7JRq3tFuLwZVCT3gzz_voLFQiKuNmBCbq6YLtfpp1TIbRaA/3us/iY2mKpsbTsaRyWqQvi2Bpw/h2/YpFU80D0_i6HsT5UwxdEgev3qbQ3BG4OW6JB2ByMBMU)**** | [250 DONATION GOAL: CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad_5UllwNhUCbeZ3Pa5HRQ4-yF-WJt6GRmhTAP07szSJShlFBiDm41DSzWAFHrR-EjAm7x5AF0wkmBoMJWll3WISVxdQxn65nyMIH2Dlfk01d__aw5Y4dqZN2RTvZI7CKS5bgv5t546GpumLv8la_NwMSTVUGgq5WjK-rUziq5G79lFboJ68wJsPI1Q76fNA3-Qf70ZgXSQ0_FfFu0GeVZ-HOwF8mNEcQl2lJl0oJ2wezRlwdxUiL4URQhIlmeb-7GqdDn2IJNPErBaIzdtuF7T28cB1I4zOSE9YL5G1FaXjxJpCph_TAbiJhmfr71rcy5bAyv4xfKxKCaDqiov_P9Bw/3us/iY2mKpsbTsaRyWqQvi2Bpw/h3/n3tKOb-VuuHv4vSCvB5sTSNFC19C5h8StqKVUSHU4PA)

Let me explain:

* **On the economy** – I fought hard to deliver bipartisan bills to the President's desk that support American manufacturing, create a green technology workforce here at home, and expand the middle class.

* **On healthcare** — I’m putting people and patients first, working with the Biden administration to cut costs, including capping insulin at $35.

* **Now as the ranking member of the Select Subcommittee on the coronavirus pandemic** , I’m taking that same laser-focused approach to call out Republican misinformation and attacks on our dedicated public health officials.

Unfortunately, the GOP's extreme partisan rhetoric and witch hunts of public officials like Dr. Fauci are hurting the American people and our health.

They’ll say anything and spend everything to silence voices that call out their BS. _We can’t afford to let them take the majority again in next year’s elections._
[**So I’m counting on you, friend – we missed February’s fundraising targets by the slimmest of margins, so I’m asking you to chip in $5 right now to help me stay ahead of Republican attacks and keep this critical House seat blue »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad0YXo5OkenWSPIIJLSAEFT7Mu1Sbz-XnJwrrENYlcQJZVeiuoLRF0llFegZ1SbrcRbpXNK6RG-T3FKWY-ON8iJz7vGrN8X9b_U71yNcjeWWm5S2d_ZmnyeNrFA0Kwi8_iTw6Panpx_pt4CknuMfX9K5dPUZOM8zEWv83Lg6yreoSbpepunRnlLyrqETYCcRCDRb20Vs6KjYUS5LMdoVGrJzLlACTBYhZ6TfuO2ONo1Xkaa5tGEC58XxsbDLODtPI4gYguGoxqQ34OpsC3amz5GiMNwhJA0UIAOwa7BYLZdTVkOP_tYqyg3FUxiSffMef5g/3us/iY2mKpsbTsaRyWqQvi2Bpw/h4/z_Y5ivp4mw7BTh3PJKQjixvuDB0WkcS5IQGuQ2g39eo)****

clean_body: Let me explain: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, since coming to Congress, I've been laser-focused on putting people above politics. ** | Let me explain: On the economy – I fought hard to deliver bipartisan bills to the President's desk that support American manufacturing, create a green technology workforce here at home, and expand the middle class. On healthcare — I’m putting people and patients first, working with the Biden administration to cut costs, including capping insulin at $35. Now as the ranking member of the Select Subcommittee on the coronavirus pandemic , I’m taking that same laser-focused approach to call out Republican misinformation and attacks on our dedicated public health officials. Unfortunately, the GOP's extreme partisan rhetoric and witch hunts of public officials like Dr. Fauci are hurting the American people and our health. They’ll say anything and spend everything to silence voices that call out their BS. We can’t afford to let them take the majority again in next year’s elections. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for helping me continue to prioritize public health! — Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: BREAKING: We thought we'd heard the worst about Trump appointed Judge, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, who'll almost definitively overturn the FDA approved, extremely safe/popular abortion pll, Mifepristone. But it's so much worse than we thought.
body:
Safe, simple abortion method could disappear
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bda7542-2b4b-4744-a1d8-587aa7f59639/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_BREAKING: We thought we'd heard the worst about Trump appointed Judge, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, who'll almost definitively overturn the FDA approved, extremely safe/popular abortion pll, Mifepristone. But it's so much worse than we thought._** **It turns out Kacsmaryk doesn't even care to hide he's a right-wing advocate, even as a "judge." Erin Morrow Hawley'****_s one of the lawyers leading the charge vs. the FDA to have the abortion pill banned._ If the name sounds familiar, it's because _her husband is repulsive, seditionist Senator Josh Hawley._** **_Wanna guess to whose campaign this "judge" just donated? Josh Hawley, of course(!), the husband of a lawyer appearing before him in court._** **_We can't allow this extremist to hijack women's rights. We maybe can't stop his decision, but we sure as hell can have it overturned on appeal.[_So,_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3d1621d-939a-4002-b6c2-c1134ba58c87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_[_ w_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te37e1d7f-1bdc-4dfd-a80e-c8cc9a43d9a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[** _ill you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Center for Reproductive Rights' Abortion Defense Network to fight this attack on our basic rights?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0ecfb56-8d22-48c8-93f2-09a4a4f465fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| _Kacsmaryk even has a bizarre obsession with the sexuality of others, referring to gay Americans as "disordered" and saying the "Sexual Revolution" was about how "...marriage, sexuality, gender identity, and even the unborn child must yield to the erotic desires of liberated adults." Get the man in therapy, and away from women's bodies._ **_We can't allow this extremist to hijack women's rights, but we sure as hell can work to have it overturned on appeal.[_So,_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fd9e636-769b-4914-9f3d-7f8a2b7f0137/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_[_ w_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T687e97c0-e4d4-4dcb-9dc0-e29e20681a24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[** _ill you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Center for Reproductive Rights' Abortion Defense Network to fight this attack on our basic rights?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6679d07-eb29-4620-ad72-118d2dfb5910/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for never giving in to extremists who think they get to substitute their warped judgment for that of well-adjusted human beings._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Less than a WEEK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479778:Jki8gZGNQ:m:1:3365131770:FAD84B6AE48316CE550E1307B96A5341:r)
---
Peter,

I'm on a mission for the next seven days to gather the resources necessary to hit my End-of-Quarter fundraising goal that my team set out when we started 2023.

Friend, we have a critical update on the state of our race, so we'll get right to it.
**_FIRST:_** Democrats lost our critical majority in the House – making the Senate our last line of defense on everything from protecting reproductive freedom to voting rights.
**_THEN:_** Analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ __ confirmed that Mitch McConnell and the GOP have "a clear path" to retaking the Senate majority next year.
_NOW:_ That path could run straight through Ohio, and national Republicans have already launched their first attack ad to defeat Sherrod and flip this seat red.

name: James Carville
subject: calling it like it is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60721490/398041007/-2027916988?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230325_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzMGE1ZTA2LTQ5Y2ItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ei_ttrGMDrhWozJvjpWMTcfNS2u8-CpEVYog-qG07ds=) Hey Peter — James Carville here. Jon Tester just launched his reelection campaign and I can already tell this race is going to be NUTS!!

We already know the Senate majority will come down to Montana – and if we don’t keep Jon Tester in the Senate, **Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye!**

I have a reputation for calling it like it is. In my expert opinion, _this is the most important election in the country._ We don’t yet know who Jon’s opponent will be, but we have a few clues, and none of the options look good.

That’s why we need to do EVERYTHING we can to support Jon in this race right as this campaign is rolling!

When I called Jon to ask how I could help, he said they had a critical fundraising coming up in 6 days and he thought I might be able to convince you folks how important this is.

body:
| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

Ron Wyden (D-Ore.)._

---

---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479467:J2jugZGNS:m:1:3331421248:51A052D14810F1541FD6974179148533:r "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

body:
Friend, can we count on you to help us pull off a major upset?
| | | This is why Elon Musk is one of the greatest minds today...
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlUMFunDAQ_RpzMzJjY7MHDsmuNlWkSukhidoL8toDOMGAjMlq_76GrHqpZFma9-bNm3lYF1IdlKpAqczWAnTRmszVwIAzDiUUDMoir2QpKltJYQ5CiwMjgqHXbsjbgBh7N35isKm-5WbyWV8r5MgOFZTKaG2ULZXkvLXSCiyluPBsqPsY54XwBwLn9BY0a8D86saAdhuSsEIpSecwfaCJdNYmQThMI73qhQbX9ZHubYSf1-ibZVqDQcJPSbHMSeLGjoDcKI_WrT5Rvab72nfcaD9r142Jud8LDTLGRKHosjT_mTWb37dyGiOOMQknT9toExy2C8Jmyk8xrJgg7ad1bypZqppxcDYVv87i4ucfL32_g72zKYbT-0UfP5_tVxZqO1_dMLhFqhRzt8e8pZqWHVx7q4l6JAC7DGAPENbI3_Tr689wo7__PNOn8g26jYRj-uNtxn-d9yH5PQYg6vQXm5miSw)

Elon is right - our children are being indoctrinated to hate America and espouse marxist ideas, and most parents don’t even know it. But thankfully, we have a plan to put an end to the radical indoctrination in our schools and stand up for parents who are being kept in the dark. You may already know that the 1776 Project PAC was the first PAC of its kind; designed specifically to replace left wing school board members across the country. But what you may not know is that 2023 is the biggest election year for our schools on record. We’re endorsing and supporting 250 conservative school board candidates! Friend, this is the largest school board election effort from any conservative organization in American HISTORY! And if we’re going to pull this off- we need to know whether or not we can count on your support this year... Can we count on your support in pulling off the largest conservative school board sweep in American History?

clean_body: Friend, can we count on you to help us pull off a major upset? | | | This is why Elon Musk is one of the greatest minds today... Elon is right - our children are being indoctrinated to hate America and espouse marxist ideas, and most parents don’t even know it. But thankfully, we have a plan to put an end to the radical indoctrination in our schools and stand up for parents who are being kept in the dark. You may already know that the 1776 Project PAC was the first PAC of its kind; designed specifically to replace left wing school board members across the country. But what you may not know is that 2023 is the biggest election year for our schools on record. We’re endorsing and supporting 250 conservative school board candidates! Friend, this is the largest school board election effort from any conservative organization in American HISTORY! And if we’re going to pull this off- we need to know whether or not we can count on your support this year... Can we count on your support in pulling off the largest conservative school board sweep in American History? Just last year, President Biden brought together Democrats and Republicans to pass the first significant gun safety law in _nearly 30 years._ And over the past two years, _President Biden has taken more executive action to reduce gun violence than any other president at this point in their presidency._
Now, he’s taking another critical step forward. Earlier this month, President Biden traveled to Monterey Park, California -- one community on the growing list of those that are forever changed due to gun violence -- to announce an Executive Order.
**President Biden’s order will help move the U.S. as close to universal background checks as possible without additional legislation, strengthen efforts to hold the gun industry accountable, and accelerate law enforcement efforts to identify and apprehend the shooters menacing our communities.**
We must pass universal background checks, eliminate gun manufacturers’ immunity from liability, and ban assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. And with a Democratic Congress, we _can_.
**[Can we count on you to give $7 to the DNC today to help elect more Democrats across the country who are committed to taking a stand against gun violence?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJiY2TTbsc_iUg3NevhGBV89g35WimDZKSoiHyzQvdRRS3tmR1gzMiu8hZvjHMLvQ4nI-Nu_4Sqbe3x-2cV4myIQ-EBtaV1s9WqbeIKjK53NVq0c9NTYtTORce0ecy0LamIspf9W1N9LYlg3xOfRXAliqJfRgoz0C3mg1M3DDDfchmu33bL1gBKB0jV4Hwf0jcjEco0vhMte5ZzJ5lJmPbeow4Rg3j7a4U5U86RzEIZFbXKuQl_yzL8HiPpYwZfLsXcfDvoPMUrHFW_8Nukq6E3ZsgryaHSdvxCUE5EMRyvQ9l-U_KPLzhPGfG8NvnIEPuNQ-nR8nIESSF_Ck9YhPhWVfNmW0BVf1UPiwR9iN3HcdGaLuuHpjst_fMufIe_YDcdf6JGDB0DfxtgSrhFpv_YusJQLTBzrWU1p8gjVEwX5eDHlHpkzV-pL_SR8RbtMas66ZyAdDMFF7RiR3lSKqdYQ/3us/-m25Zb8eQpSVQRRGM_hZhg/h7/5soHi588RXah03XHQPRkVQ5TVzhTGo1DoxY63ThCeqg)**

Will you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help elect more Democrats across the country who are committed to fighting back against gun violence? Just last year, President Biden brought together Democrats and Republicans to pass the first significant gun safety law in nearly 30 years. And over the past two years, President Biden has taken more executive action to reduce gun violence than any other president at this point in their presidency. Now, he’s taking another critical step forward. Earlier this month, President Biden traveled to Monterey Park, California -- one community on the growing list of those that are forever changed due to gun violence -- to announce an Executive Order. President Biden’s order will help move the U.S. as close to universal background checks as possible without additional legislation, strengthen efforts to hold the gun industry accountable, and accelerate law enforcement efforts to identify and apprehend the shooters menacing our communities. We must pass universal background checks, eliminate gun manufacturers’ immunity from liability, and ban assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. And with a Democratic Congress, we can. body:

| | [_**Tomorrow is my birthday — and I'm so incredibly touched by all of your well wishes that have already started to flow in. But what I want more than anything is your personal endorsement for House Democrats. Republicans are spreading vicious lies about our Democrats to shut us out of the House Majority FOREVER. So I want to gather 50,000 strong endorsements for Democrats to prove Americans want Democrats in control, shut down Republicans’ false attacks, and prove them absolutely wrong. Could you take 10 seconds to add your endorsement for me? It would mean so much to me. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60730851/398046177/-2057515668?source=20230325_em_pet_b2_pelosi_30_op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2JjZDczMC01NGNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDvsvbHsQpCt6J_d3IIh3haWIfNhPatpb4PxmYtojKU=&emci=a923291f-80ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=73bcd730-54cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219) | What I want more than anything for my birthday is your personal endorsement for House Democrats. Republicans are spreading vicious lies to sabotage Democrats’ chances of reclaiming the Majority. I need input from 50,000 endorsements to prove Republicans’ attacks completely false. [_**I urgently need 50,000 supporters to officially sign their endorsements for Democrats and help me shut down Republicans’ smear attacks. If I don’t gather the necessary endorsements, Kevin McCarthy will take it as a sign that his attacks are working, and that Americans want Republicans to stay in power. I won’t let that happen. It would mean so much to me if you’d add your endorsement before my birthday ends. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60730853/398046178/-2057515668?source=20230325_em_pet_b2_pelosi_30_op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2JjZDczMC01NGNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDvsvbHsQpCt6J_d3IIh3haWIfNhPatpb4PxmYtojKU=&emci=a923291f-80ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=73bcd730-54cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219) [****NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60730855/398046179/-2057515668?source=20230325_em_pet_b2_pelosi_30_op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2JjZDczMC01NGNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDvsvbHsQpCt6J_d3IIh3haWIfNhPatpb4PxmYtojKU=&emci=a923291f-80ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=73bcd730-54cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219)

I can’t tell you how touched I am by all of your birthday wishes.
[**But I’ll be honest -- what I want more than anything is your personal endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60730859/398046181/-2057515668?source=20230325_em_pet_b2_pelosi_30_op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2JjZDczMC01NGNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDvsvbHsQpCt6J_d3IIh3haWIfNhPatpb4PxmYtojKU=&emci=a923291f-80ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=73bcd730-54cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16320219)
Republicans are spreading vicious lies to shut Democrats out of the Majority forever.

We’re not exaggerating when we say that Dan Kelly is _bad_ for Wisconsin and _bad_ for this country.
He’s made his allegiances clear – and he won’t hesitate to rubber stamp Republicans’ extreme plans in Wisconsin. He’ll allow them to threaten our rights, destroy our freedoms, and erode our democracy.
Even worse, according to _The Guardian_ he has an army of insurrectionists who have poured millions of dollars into Wisconsin to try to swing the race in Kelly’s favor. That’s who backs him – that’s who he’ll support if he wins in 10 days.
**But if we win this election, we can stop GOP extremism in its tracks. It’s up to us to counter the money from election deniers – and make it clear that we will fight back to defend our rights and our freedoms.**
[Time is running out – there are only 10 days left until voters head to the ballot box. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Here’s a number we’re really proud of: $32.25 is our average donation
since Adam launched his campaign for U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]$32.35 average contribution

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]Will you chip in $32.25 or any amount that works for you? Our FEC
deadline is days away, so any amount makes a huge difference.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1853?c0=mar2023_abs_em.l2Gozn&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]DONATE $32.25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We’re building this grassroots campaign from the ground up, and our $32.25
average gift shows it. It all adds up.

For years, this grassroots team has helped Adam lead the fight against
Trump and Trumpism, MAGA Republicans, and election deniers. When some
might’ve thrown in the towel, you stepped up.

Online donations are how we flipped the House in 2018.

Online donations are how we won the White House and Senate in 2020.

Online donations are how we expanded our Senate majority in 2022.

And online donations — just $32.25 at a time — are how we’re going to win
California and take Adam’s message to the Senate.

Our campaign doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we’re relying on
your support as we get this movement going. Especially before this crucial
FEC deadline.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1853?c0=mar2023_abs_em.l2Gozn&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]Derek, will you join Team Schiff by making a donation of
$32.25 today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230325_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1997%2E5257348%2Ebh-bUQ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

name: Josh Harder
subject: my new GOP opponent
body:

body:
Parents are Fascists! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkkckt-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* White House **[priorities are all wrong](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-y/)!**
* Sixteen people on the**[FBI Terror Watchlist](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-j/) **arrested at the border.
* This store has had to **[stop selling eggs](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* **[Biden's first veto](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-i/) **is infuriating!
* The **[GOP had a birthday](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-d/)**.
* Russia is **[testing us](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-h/)**.
* Biologist declares **[there are only two sexes](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* **[Grand Jury meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-u/)** about Trump canceled.
* **[Newsmax is back](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-o/)** on TV.
* [**Trump's 10 point plan**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-x/)**** to dismantle the Deep State.
* National Archives **[torpedoed Biden's defense](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* **[Biden's approval rating](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-c/)** plummets!
* Russia and China are [**united against us**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-q/)
* Will a possible indictment [**hurt or help Trump?** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-a/)

### **House Fails to Override Veto**
**[The U.S. House failed to override Biden's first veto](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-f/)** -- of a Republican-led bill that would have banned the consideration of environmental, social, and governance issues in retirement and other investment decisions.
### **Parents are Fascists**
[**Alexandra Ocasio-Cortez was criticized after she alleged that the Republican-sponsored Parents Bill of Rights being considered in Congress is "fascist."**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-z/) The bill seeks to strengthen parents' knowledge of and involvement in their children's education. **Canada Says No to Illegals** The US and Canada struck a deal where [**Canada can turn away asylum seekers trying to enter the country from New York**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-v/) [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkckt-trhiujldw-yh/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkkckt-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yu) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qkkckt-trhiujldw-jl/)
